overview.highlight: 一周构建1个包含资料搜集、知识整合、报告生成功能的智能调研系统Demo
overview.industry: 信息技术,金融贸易,科研教育

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周构建1个包含资料搜集、知识整合、报告生成功能的智能调研系统Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 智能调研任务广泛应用于金融贸易、咨询管理、公共政策、市场营销、企业运营等行业的竞调行研、监督查阅、培训学习等场合，拥有广阔的使用需求和极高的使用频率。
**解决方案**: 本例根据用户输入的研究主题和关键词，自动搜集相关资料，基于智能流程进行知识提取与整合，最终按预设模板生成并输出调研文档。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，科研教育，金融贸易
**应用类别**: 服务，运营，管理
**技术类别**: 大语言模型（LLM），自然语言处理（NLP），智能体（Agent），检索增强生成（RAG），文本生成

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：3.5-5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名1111-1111

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工调研效率低下：完成一份完整的调研报告（如行研报告、竞调报告等），具备专业知识的调研人员通常需要花费1-3周时间进行资料搜集、整理、分析、撰写
- 信息整合难度大：面对海量信息源，人工筛选和整合容易遗漏重要内容，且难以保证信息的准确性和时效性
- 报告格式不统一：不同人员、不同机构的行文风格与布局要求差异较大，影响报告的规范性与一致性
- 更新维护成本高：市场环境快速变化，人工更新和维护调研报告版本需要持续投入；组建调研团队或邀请专家也需要额外成本

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 全网资料搜集：基于用户输入的主题和关键词，自动在全网搜集相关资料
- 信息整合分析：对收集到的候选资料提取关键信息并生成观点与概述
- 自动报告生成：按照预设模板自动生成结构化调研文档

subsections.title: 3.1 版本信息
content: - 版本类型：私部署-服务器部署版
- 实践者信息：Real-World AI自研及验证
- 原作者英文名称：Real-World AI
- 作者网站：本站
- 关联引用：Claude Code (by Anthropic), Metaso MCP (by 秘塔科技), GLM-4.7 (by 智谱)

subsections.title: 3.1.2 入选最佳实践理由
content: **指标提升**:
- 该方案在Deep Research评测基准DeepResearch Bench上跑测综合得分为51.86，在该榜单截止12月24日全部开源可用方案中排名第2位（与第1位方案tavily-research（51.97）综合得分差距小于1.5%，确保生成报告准确、可信，提升用户体验
- 该方案的报告平均生成时间≤15分钟，比salesforce-air-deep-research（平均约为20分钟）快33%，提升调研效率
**成本优化**:
- 该方案支持以GLM-4.7等API收费相对更低的高性能大模型为基座，从而节省近60%运营成本
- 该方案生成报告模板的契合度≥95%，格式规范度≥99%，相比人工方案（约1周，需沟通、调研、专家咨询、校对、排版等流程），人力成本降低约95%

subsections.title: 3.1.3 实施详情
content: [实践详情](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/DCXfwDrSnip1q1kePdscpcl0n7b?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: **核心业务指标**:
- 单篇文档调研准确率：报告模板契合度≥95%，格式规范度≥99%，提效格式修订等流程
- 单篇文档审阅时间：缩短至15分钟以内（人工需1周），支持大规模、稳定的批量生成
- 单篇文档人力投入成本：结合上述提效指标与下述技术指标，可减少人工操作与复核成本达95%、提升用户体验
**核心技术指标**:
- 单篇文档调研性能综合评估：DeepResearch Bench综合得分≥51，确保生成报告可信度

phases.title: PHASE 1 需求识别与团队构建1111-1111

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: **业务对接人（×1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作
**业务侧技术对接人（×1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作实际在用/预期涉及的技术功能与流程、建设与规划，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通，建议首选架构师或技术型项目经理，其次为具体技术执行人员（如后端工程师等）
**算法对接人（×1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 业务对接人与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
业务对接人（代表需求方团队）填写算法对接人（代表承做方团队）提供的项目合作需求问询书；如果已有较明确的构想、能拆解出多个子任务，可进一步填写子任务算法需求模板
双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如样例数据、专业知识参考资料等
算法对接人协调自己团队，根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

phases.title: PHASE 2 价值确认与需求细化

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: **业务对接人（×1）**：同PHASE 1
**业务侧技术对接人（×1）**：同PHASE 1
**业务专家（×1）**：该案例对应业务工作中涉及核心业务模块的领导者、执行者或专家，协助业务对接人明确业务痛点与价值
**产品经理（×1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人细化需求，并设计原型，该职位可由承做方提供，可由业务对接人担任
**算法对接人（×1）**：同PHASE 1
**算法专家（×1）**：熟悉各场景与应用中业界目前的前沿与通用技术方案及选型，协助算法对接人评估需求，协调团队进行调研、设计方案与架构，协助评估排期，可由算法对接人担任

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）
算法对接人与己方算法专家及相关团队沟通，罗列待确认事项，同时对方案进行初步调研、评估、设计
产品经理与业务对接人和算法对接人沟通、梳理并明确需求，之后组织双方相关人员撰写初步验证需求文档
双方根据初步验证需求文档进行需求确认，根据确认的需求规划排期、预算和资源。排期建议：首先以承接方完成初步验证、选型、产出Demo，并通过PoC为首个里程碑；之后双方进一步协商正式立项实施
重复以上步骤直至初步验证需求文档定稿

subsections.title: 参与人员
content: - 角色名称：算法工程师
- 技能要求：
1. 熟练使用多种思维链策略，对前沿与流行的开/闭源大模型资源较熟悉，有自己的使用经验、使用总结与心得
2. 熟练掌握NLP经典深度学习模型（如Transformer系、LLaMA系、GLM系等）及相关资源（网站、库、博客等）；掌握至少一种常用深度学习开发框架，如PyTorch等；对GPT-3.5之后的大规模生成式语言模型（大模型）的工作原理和最新消息保持持续关注与兴趣
3. 熟练掌握Python语言，会使用基本的正则表达式和命令行脚本；熟知NLP基础概念及经典任务（分类、匹配、序列标注、生成等）；能熟练运用常见NLP开源库（HanLP、LTP、Jieba等）
4. 态度积极主动，沟通有条理，有好奇心与自驱力
- 角色数量：1 人

subsections.title: 本步输入
content: - 输入名称：安装和配置 Claude Code
- 输入介绍：基于 Node 环境来安装和配置 Claude Code
- 输入示例：
- 相关命令如下：
```bash
# 安装 Claude Code
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
# 配置环境变量（以 ~/.bashrc 为例，其他如 ~/.zshrc 等同理）
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="YOUR_BASE_URL"' >> ~/.bashrc
echo 'export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="YOUR_AUTH_TOKEN"' >> ~/.bashrc
# 配置模型
vim ~/.claude/settings.json
```json
"env": {
"ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL": "YOUR_HAIKU_MODEL",
"ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL": "YOUR_SONNET_MODEL",
"ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL": "YOUR_OPUS_MODEL"
```bash
# 启动成功确认命令，claude 进入命令行，输入任意文字后有收到对应回复且无报错则配置完成
claude
> your_input
- 资源链接：
- Claude Code GitHub：https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code

content: - 输出名称：可用的 Claude Code 服务

subsections.title: 本步输入
content: - 输入名称：github、huggingface、arxiv-mcp 服务构建、启动（可选）
- 输入介绍：通过安装相关 python 依赖来安装和启动相关 mcp 服务
- 输入示例：
- 创建 requirements.txt 文件：
```bash
# 建议 python 3.10 及以上版本，如 python 3.11
loguru>=0.7.0
python-dotenv>=1.0.0
- 创建相关服务 python 文件：
```bash
[github_server.py]
[hf_server.py]
[arxiv_server.py]
- 安装依赖并启动：
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python github_server.py
python hf_server.py
python arxiv_server.py
- 注：看到类似"Uvicorn running on http://0.0.0.0:PORT (Press CTRL+C to quit)"则启动成功
- 注册 MCP 服务：
```bash
# arxiv
claude mcp add -s user -t sse paper-arxiv http://127.0.0.1:4002/sse
# github
claude mcp add -s user -t sse code-github http://127.0.0.1:4001/sse
# huggingface

overview.highlight: Build an intelligent research system demo with data collection, knowledge integration, and report generation in one week
overview.industry: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Science & Education

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build an intelligent research system demo with data collection, knowledge integration, and report generation in one week

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Intelligent research tasks are widely used in competitive analysis, regulatory review, training and learning scenarios across industries such as finance & trade, consulting & management, public policy, marketing, and enterprise operations, with extensive demand and high usage frequency.

**Solution**: Based on user-input research topics and keywords, this system automatically collects relevant materials, performs knowledge extraction and integration through intelligent workflows, and ultimately generates and outputs research documents according to predefined templates.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Science & Education, Finance & Trade
**Category**: Service, Operations, Management
**Technology**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Text Generation

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency in manual research: Completing a comprehensive research report (such as industry analysis, competitive analysis reports) typically requires professional researchers 1-3 weeks for data collection, organization, analysis, and writing

- Difficulty in information integration: Faced with massive information sources, manual screening and integration can easily miss important content, and it is difficult to ensure information accuracy and timeliness
- Inconsistent report formats: Different personnel and institutions have significantly different writing styles and layout requirements, affecting report standardization and consistency

- High update and maintenance costs: Rapidly changing market environments require continuous investment in updating and maintaining research report versions; forming research teams or inviting experts also incurs additional costs

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Internet-wide data collection: Automatically collect relevant materials across the internet based on user-input topics and keywords
- Information integration and analysis: Extract key information from collected candidate materials and generate insights and summaries
- Automatic report generation: Automatically generate structured research documents according to predefined templates

subsections.title: 3.1 Version Information
content: - Version Type: Private Deployment - Server Deployment
- Practitioner Information: Real-World AI Self-developed and Verified
- Original Author English Name: Real-World AI
- Author Website: This Site
- Related References: Claude Code (by Anthropic), Metaso MCP (by Metaso Tech), GLM-4.7 (by Zhipu)
- Initial Release Date: 2025-11-20
- Last Updated: 2026-02-02
- Last Reviewed: 2026-02-02

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: **Performance Improvement**:

- This solution achieved a comprehensive score of 51.86 on the Deep Research benchmark DeepResearch Bench, ranking 2nd among all open-source available solutions on the leaderboard as of December 24th (within 1.5% of the 1st place solution tavily-research (51.97)), ensuring accurate and credible report generation, enhancing user experience
- The solution's average report generation time is ≤15 minutes, 33% faster than salesforce-air-deep-research (average ~20 minutes), improving research efficiency
**Cost Optimization**:
- This solution supports using high-performance large models with relatively lower API costs such as GLM-4.7 as the foundation, saving nearly 60% in operational costs

- This solution achieves report template fit ≥95%, format compliance ≥99%, reducing labor costs by approximately 95% compared to manual solutions (~1 week, requiring communication, research, expert consultation, proofreading, formatting processes)

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/DCXfwDrSnip1q1kePdscpcl0n7b?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:
- Single document research accuracy: Report template fit ≥95%, format compliance ≥99%, streamlining format revision processes
- Single document review time: Reduced to under 15 minutes (manual requires 1 week), supporting large-scale, stable batch generation
- Single document labor cost: Combined with the above efficiency metrics and technical metrics below, can reduce manual operation and review costs by 95%, improving user experience
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Single document research performance comprehensive evaluation: DeepResearch Bench comprehensive score ≥51, ensuring generated report credibility

overview.highlight: 快速搭建一个大模型，通过对话生成SQL脚本

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 快速搭建一个大模型，通过对话生成SQL脚本

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 将用户以自然语言描述的查询需求转换为SQL查询语句。
**解决方案**: 使用NL2SQL任务目前开源SOTA的XiYanSQL-QwenCoder模型系列，快速搭建大模型实现通过对话生成SQL脚本。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术
**应用类别**: 服务
**技术类别**: 大语言模型（LLM），自然语言处理，数据治理，基座大模型，模型评测，NL2SQL，数据库，运维

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：2-4日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 传统数据库操作需要专门的运维人员或数据库管理员，对此类人员的SQL语言能力要求较高；而需要特定数据的算法人员，也存在学习SQL语言的成本
- 传统操作人工审批流程繁琐，效率低
- 数据流动高、数据量大，为任务带来额外挑战

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - **用户指令理解**: 精准理解用户自然语言表达的SQL语言生成需求
- **最佳SQL脚本生成**: 根据用户需求筛选并获取多个候选SQL指令模式、从中整合、检查、排序，返回最优结果

subsections.title: 2.7 核心业务指标
content: - 生成单次SQL脚本的时间不超过1秒
- 生成SQL脚本的平均准确率达95%
- 降低50%人力成本

subsections.title: 2.8 核心技术指标
content: - 与业务指标一致

subsections.title: 3.1 私部署-服务器部署版
content: **入选最佳实践理由**: 本方案使用NL2SQL任务目前开源SOTA的XiYanSQL-QwenCoder模型系列。该系列最新的32B参数量级模型XiYanSQL-QwenCoder-32B-2504，在与包括但不限于MCS-SQL+GPT-4o的10+现有NL2SQL任务头部方法的对比中，在经典评测集BIRD上取得执行准确率(Execution Accuracy，EX-score) 75.63%的SOTA结果、在经典测评集Spider Test上取得EX值89.65%的SOTA结果。本方案给出快速基于该模型搭建的步骤，并给出了基于评测集BIRD进行复现与跑测的过程，确保方案完整可复现。
**实践者信息**:
- 称呼：Real-World AI转载及验证
**原作者信息**:
- 中文名称：阿里云团队
- 英文名称：Alibaba Cloud XGenerationLab
- 作者网站：https://cn.aliyun.com/product/bailian/xiyan
**关联引用**:
- XiYan-SQL(by 阿里) Github：https://github.com/XGenerationLab/XiYan-SQL
- XiYanSQL-QwenCoder(by 阿里) GitHub：https://github.com/XGenerationLab/XiYanSQL-QwenCoder

content: 输入名称：就绪的环境，模型配置所需资源

输入示例： 模型下载和模型部署
模型部署（基于vLLM）：
```python
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
# 模型路径
model_path = "XGenerationLab/XiYanSQL-QwenCoder-32B-2504" # 替换为本地模型路径
# 初始化LLM和分词器
llm = LLM(model=model_path, tensor_parallel_size=8) # 根据GPU数量调整tensor_parallel_size
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_path)
# 配置采样参数
sampling_params = SamplingParams(
temperature=0.1,
max_tokens=1024
# 准备提示词（同上）
prompt = nl2sqlite_template_cn.format(
dialect="PostgreSQL", # 选择对应的方言
question="你的问题",
db_schema="数据库schema信息",
evidence="参考信息（可选）"
# 构建对话
message = [{'role': 'user', 'content': prompt}]
text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
message,
tokenize=False,
add_generation_prompt=True
# 推理
outputs = llm.generate([text], sampling_params=sampling_params)
response = outputs[0].outputs[0].text
print(response)
资源链接：
XiYanSQL-QwenCoder模型文件 HuggingFace：https://huggingface.co/XGenerationLab/XiYanSQL-QwenCoder-32B-2504

overview.highlight: Rapidly build a large model that generates SQL scripts via conversation

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Rapidly build a large model that generates SQL scripts via conversation

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Convert user query requirements described in natural language into SQL query statements.
**Solution**: Use the XiYanSQL-QwenCoder model series, which is currently the open-source SOTA for NL2SQL tasks, to rapidly build a large model that generates SQL scripts via conversation.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology
**Application Category**: Service
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing, Data Governance, Foundation Model, Model Evaluation, NL2SQL, Database, Operations

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 2-4 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Expert

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Traditional database operations require dedicated operations personnel or database administrators, with high requirements for SQL language proficiency; algorithm personnel who need specific data also face learning costs for SQL language
- Traditional manual approval processes are cumbersome and inefficient
- High data flow and large data volumes bring additional challenges to the task

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - **User Instruction Understanding**: Accurately understand SQL language generation requirements expressed in user's natural language
- **Optimal SQL Script Generation**: Filter and obtain multiple candidate SQL instruction patterns based on user requirements, integrate, check, and sort them, and return the optimal result

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Business Metrics
content: - Time to generate a single SQL script does not exceed 1 second
- Average accuracy of generated SQL scripts reaches 95%
- Reduce labor costs by 50%

subsections.title: 2.8 Core Technical Metrics
content: - Consistent with business metrics

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: **Reason for Selection as Best Practice**: This solution uses the XiYanSQL-QwenCoder model series, which is currently the open-source SOTA for NL2SQL tasks. The latest 32B parameter model XiYanSQL-QwenCoder-32B-2504, in comparison with 10+ leading NL2SQL task methods including but not limited to MCS-SQL+GPT-4o, achieved SOTA results with Execution Accuracy (EX-score) of 75.63% on the classic benchmark BIRD and EX value of 89.65% on the classic benchmark Spider Test. This solution provides steps for rapid deployment based on this model and gives the process of reproduction and testing based on the benchmark BIRD, ensuring the solution is complete and reproducible.

Input Example: Model Download and Model Deployment
Model Deployment (based on vLLM):
```python
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
# Model path
model_path = "XGenerationLab/XiYanSQL-QwenCoder-32B-2504" # Replace with local model path
# Initialize LLM and tokenizer
llm = LLM(model=model_path, tensor_parallel_size=8) # Adjust tensor_parallel_size based on GPU count
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_path)
# Configure sampling parameters
sampling_params = SamplingParams(
temperature=0.1,
max_tokens=1024
# Prepare prompt
prompt = nl2sqlite_template_cn.format(
dialect="PostgreSQL", # Select appropriate dialect
question="Your question",
db_schema="Database schema information",
evidence="Reference information (optional)"
# Build conversation
message = [{'role': 'user', 'content': prompt}]
text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
message,
tokenize=False,
add_generation_prompt=True
# Inference
outputs = llm.generate([text], sampling_params=sampling_params)
response = outputs[0].outputs[0].text
print(response)

overview.highlight: 一周基于低代码构建一个具备主动追问与推荐能力的对话式助手Demo

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周基于低代码构建一个具备主动追问与推荐能力的对话式助手Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 近年来，随着AI技术爆发与各行业智能化转型热潮，海量垂直行业非算法从业者迫切想要找到满足需求、适合自己的各类AI工具，但较难通过传统方式达到目的。
**解决方案**: 面对此类垂直行业'信息不对称'现象，本例构建一个面向垂直领域AI工具选择的智能导引助手，以'专家咨询'方式，针对用户模糊、不完整（如仅输入'我要找个写文档的工具'）的自然语言查询，主动发起澄清式追问，通过有限轮次对话，逐步完成对用户的精准AI工具推荐。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，科研教育
**应用类别**: 服务，运营
**技术类别**: 智能体 (Agent)，大语言模型 (LLM)，自然语言处理 (NLP)，知识图谱 (KG)，意图理解，检索增强生成（RAG）

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：≤ 7日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - **模糊意图导致幻觉严重**: 用户常无法准确描述技术约束（如预算、部署方式、具体需求等），传统对话机器人要么不够灵活，要么存在盲目猜测与推荐，导致结果错位（如向个人用户推荐昂贵的企业软件），可用性、置信度低
- **被动交互效率低下**: 传统对话机器人在面对超出预设范围的输入时，倾向于输出'信息不足'等通用拒绝文本，缺乏建设性引导，导致用户需反复试探并自己完善表达后，才能让机器人明确需求
- **转化率与体验差**: 传统对话机器人多为被动回答，缺乏'专家级'的主动追问能力，对话易中断，用户流失率高，进而难以形成有效的业务转化和交叉推荐机会

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - **追问引导**: 面对用户表达模糊的需求，对话助手不是直接回答，而是在1~3轮追问中细化并澄清用户真实需求

subsections.title: 2.7 核心业务指标
content: - 平均对话轮次 ≤ 3 轮：减少无效对话，用户询问流程提效70%
- 任务解决率 (TSR) ≥ 90%：用户最终获得满意推荐（基于采取行动（如点击链接或好评）统计）的比例
- 首字响应延迟 < 5 秒

subsections.title: 2.8 核心技术指标
content: - 任务解决率 (TSR) ≥ 90%：同核心业务指标
- 首字响应延迟 < 5 秒：同核心业务指标
- 请求率 (REQ) > 95%：面对信息缺失查询时，对话助手主动发起追问的频率（GPT-4o该值约为15%），促进任务解决率提升
- 追问准确率 (Q-ACC) > 92%：对话助手发起的追问命中核心缺失内容的准确度，高命中使得用户询问流程提效

subsections.title: 3.1 私部署-服务器部署版
content: **入选最佳实践理由**:

- **指标提升**: 该方案的请求率 (REQ) 指标>95% ，相比GPT-4o(约15%) 提升约80%，该指标的提升与缓解模型幻觉相关，进而促进任务解决率 (TSR) ≥90%。该方案的追问准确率 (Q-ACC) 指标>92%、平均对话轮次≤3轮 ，从而在应用中显著减少无效对话，相比与通用大模型（如GPT-4o、Gemini 3等）互动得到最终解决方案的方式，使单次对话从发问到解决的效率提升70%。该方案的首字响应延迟 <5秒，确保用户实时响应体验。
- **成本优化**: 该方案基于低代码平台搭建智能流程，降低非技术人员学习门槛，同时减少研发参与人数（仅需1~2人），使启动成本下降约80%。该方案采用轻量级基座模型 (如Qwen系列15B及以下参数量级模型) 即可具备完整功能，降低约30%推理算力成本。

overview.highlight: Build a conversational assistant Demo with proactive questioning and recommendation capabilities in one week using low-code platform (AI domain)

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build a conversational assistant Demo with proactive questioning and recommendation capabilities in one week using low-code platform (AI domain)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: In recent years, with the explosion of AI technology and the wave of intelligent transformation across industries, a vast number of non-algorithm practitioners in vertical industries are urgently seeking AI tools that meet their needs and are suitable for them, but it is difficult to achieve this goal through traditional methods.

**Solution**: Addressing this 'information asymmetry' phenomenon in vertical industries, this example builds an intelligent guidance assistant for AI tool selection in vertical domains. Using an 'expert consultation' approach, it proactively initiates clarifying questions for vague and incomplete natural language queries (such as just entering 'I need a tool for writing documents'), and through limited rounds of dialogue, gradually completes precise AI tool recommendations for users.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Research & Education
**Application Category**: Service, Operations
**Technology Category**: Agent, Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Knowledge Graph (KG), Intent Understanding, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: <= 7 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - **Vague Intent Leads to Severe Hallucinations**: Users often cannot accurately describe technical constraints (such as budget, deployment method, specific requirements, etc.). Traditional chatbots are either not flexible enough or make blind guesses and recommendations, resulting in misaligned results (such as recommending expensive enterprise software to individual users), with low usability and confidence.

- **Inefficient Passive Interaction**: Traditional chatbots tend to output generic rejection texts such as 'insufficient information' when facing inputs beyond the preset range, lacking constructive guidance, causing users to repeatedly try and refine their expressions before the robot can understand their needs.

- **Poor Conversion Rate and Experience**: Traditional chatbots mostly respond passively, lacking 'expert-level' proactive questioning capabilities. Conversations are easily interrupted, user churn rate is high, making it difficult to form effective business conversions and cross-recommendation opportunities.

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - **Proactive Questioning Guidance**: When facing vaguely expressed user needs, the conversational assistant does not answer directly, but refines and clarifies the user's real needs through 1-3 rounds of questioning.

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Business Metrics
content: - Average dialogue rounds <= 3: Reduce ineffective conversations, improve user inquiry process efficiency by 70%
- Task Success Rate (TSR) >= 90%: The proportion of users who ultimately receive satisfactory recommendations (based on actions taken such as clicking links or positive reviews)
- First Token Response Latency < 5 seconds

subsections.title: 2.8 Core Technical Metrics
content: - Task Success Rate (TSR) >= 90%: Same as core business metrics
- First Token Response Latency < 5 seconds: Same as core business metrics

- Request Rate (REQ) > 95%: The frequency of the conversational assistant proactively initiating follow-up questions when facing queries with missing information (GPT-4o's value is about 15%), promoting task success rate improvement

- Question Accuracy (Q-ACC) > 92%: The accuracy of follow-up questions initiated by the conversational assistant in hitting core missing content, high hit rate improves user inquiry process efficiency

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: **Reason for Selection as Best Practice**:

- **Metric Improvement**: This solution's Request Rate (REQ) indicator is >95%, compared to GPT-4o (about 15%) improving by about 80%. The improvement of this indicator is related to alleviating model hallucinations, thereby promoting Task Success Rate (TSR) >= 90%. This solution's Question Accuracy (Q-ACC) indicator is >92%, average dialogue rounds <= 3, thus significantly reducing ineffective conversations in applications. Compared with the way of interacting with general large models (such as GPT-4o, Gemini 3, etc.) to get final solutions, the efficiency of a single conversation from question to solution is improved by 70%. This solution's first token response latency is <5 seconds, ensuring real-time user response experience.

- **Cost Optimization**: This solution builds intelligent processes based on a low-code platform, lowering the learning threshold for non-technical personnel, while reducing the number of R&D participants (only 1-2 people needed), reducing startup costs by about 80%. This solution adopts lightweight foundation models (such as Qwen series 15B and below parameter level models) to have complete functions, reducing inference computing costs by about 30%.

overview.highlight: 一周低代码构建具备多源数据整合、合规校验、信贷报告一键生成能力的银行智能信贷系统Demo

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周低代码构建具备多源数据整合、合规校验、信贷报告一键生成能力的银行智能信贷系统Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 信贷业务是银行业核心盈利来源，但报告撰写贯穿尽调、审批、贷后全流程，需投入大量人力处理数据收集、文本组织等重复工作，且面临数据来源繁杂、模板不统一、专业度参差不齐等问题，导致业务效率低、授信决策风险高。
**解决方案**: 本案例基于垂直大模型，融合 Agent、RAG、OCR 等技术，构建自动化报告生成 Demo，通过多源数据无缝对接、结构化内容生成、合规校验，快速输出可信可用的信贷报告（授信 / 尽调 / 贷后等类型），助力银行信贷业务提效降险。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 金融贸易
**应用类别**: 服务、运营
**技术类别**: 大模型（LLM），智能体（Agent），检索增强生成（RAG），光学字符识别（OCR）

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：≤7日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务（信贷）专家 1 名、算法工程师 1 名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - **人工撰写效率低下**: 报告撰写涉及大量数据搬运、文本组织工作，耗时费力，占用核心业务人力
- **数据整合难度大**: 行内系统数据、第三方工商 / 征信数据、纸质财报 / 押品材料等多源异构数据难以高效整合，易出错
- **模板与专业度不统一**: 不同银行 / 部门报告模板差异大，部分人员缺乏专业财务与行业分析能力，影响报告准确性与决策可靠性
- **审核流程繁琐**: 报告输出标准不统一，人工审核需投入大量时间修正，导致流程难以自动化

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - **多源数据自动整合**: 支持行内私有数据、金融数据源、第三方工商 / 征信 / 税务数据对接，结合 OCR 技术解析纸质文档，实现数据一键录入与校验
- **自定义模板适配**: 支持行方个性化报告模板配置与调优，覆盖授信、尽调、贷后风险评估等多类信贷场景
- **报告自动生成**: 智能拆解报告章节任务，自动匹配行方模板，完成 800 + 客观数据填充与 15 + 分析段落生成
- **数据溯源与合规校验**: 内置多源数据核验、金融合规审核规则，提供数据引用溯源，确保报告内容合规可信
- **人机协同编辑**: 支持报告润色、人工在线微调与格式排版完善，满足个性化修改需求

overview.highlight: Build an intelligent credit report generation system demo for banks in one week with low-code, featuring multi-source data integration, compliance verification, and one-click credit report generation

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build an intelligent credit report generation system demo for banks in one week with low-code, featuring multi-source data integration, compliance verification, and one-click credit report generation

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Credit business is the core profit source for banks, but report writing runs through the entire process of due diligence, approval, and post-loan management, requiring significant manpower for data collection and text organization. It faces challenges such as complex data sources, inconsistent templates, and varying levels of expertise, leading to low business efficiency and high credit decision risks.

**Solution**: This case is based on vertical large models, integrating Agent, RAG, OCR and other technologies to build an automated report generation demo. Through seamless multi-source data integration, structured content generation, and compliance verification, it quickly outputs reliable and usable credit reports (credit approval/due diligence/post-loan types), helping banks improve efficiency and reduce risks in credit business.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Finance & Trade
**Application Category**: Service, Operations
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Optical Character Recognition (OCR)

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: ≤7 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business (Credit) Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - **Low Manual Writing Efficiency**: Report writing involves significant data handling and text organization work, time-consuming and labor-intensive, occupying core business manpower

- **High Data Integration Difficulty**: Multi-source heterogeneous data from internal systems, third-party business/credit data, and paper financial statements/collateral materials are difficult to integrate efficiently and prone to errors

- **Inconsistent Templates and Expertise**: Different banks/departments have varying report templates; some personnel lack professional financial and industry analysis capabilities, affecting report accuracy and decision reliability
- **Cumbersome Review Process**: Inconsistent report output standards require significant time for manual review and corrections, making process automation difficult

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - **Multi-source Data Auto-Integration**: Supports integration of internal private data, financial data sources, third-party business/credit/tax data, combined with OCR technology to parse paper documents, enabling one-click data entry and verification

- **Custom Template Adaptation**: Supports personalized report template configuration and optimization for banks, covering multiple credit scenarios including credit approval, due diligence, and post-loan risk assessment
- **Automatic Report Generation**: Intelligently decomposes report chapter tasks, automatically matches bank templates, completes 800+ objective data filling and 15+ analysis paragraph generation

- **Data Traceability and Compliance Verification**: Built-in multi-source data verification and financial compliance review rules, provides data reference traceability, ensuring report content is compliant and trustworthy
- **Human-Machine Collaborative Editing**: Supports report refinement, manual online fine-tuning, and format layout improvement, meeting personalized modification needs

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Business Metrics
content: - **Response Latency < 10 seconds**: Time from data upload to first content generation of report draft
- **Report Coverage Rate ≥95%**: Automatic generation of core chapters (equity structure, credit rating, interbank cooperation, etc.), improving content coverage completeness
- **Report Content Accuracy > 90%**: Accuracy ratio of core data and analysis content in reports after data and text verification
- **Task Resolution Rate (TSR) >90%**: Proportion of generated reports that meet submission/review requirements after simple manual fine-tuning
- Combining the above metrics, intelligent report generation efficiency is expected to increase by 160 times compared to traditional manual entry and writing modes

subsections.title: 2.8 Core Technical Metrics
content: - **OCR Field Extraction Accuracy > 95%**: Accuracy of key information recognition and extraction from paper documents (financial statements/collateral materials)
- **Agent Task Decomposition Accuracy > 92%**: Core target hit accuracy of intelligent agents in decomposing report chapter generation tasks
- **Risk Recall Rate > 99.5%**: Recall ratio covering 5 major categories and 31 types of risk intentions
- **Multi-source Data Integration Success Rate > 98%**: Effective access and integration ratio of multi-source data from internal, third-party, and local documents
- **Follow-up Question Accuracy (Q-ACC) >90%**: Core requirement hit accuracy for intelligently initiating supplementary information follow-up questions in data-missing scenarios

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: **Reason for Selection as Best Practice**:
**Metric Improvements**:

- Generation Accuracy: The original manual + semi-automatic generation solution scored about 35 on the evaluation set built by our team based on practical experience, while this solution scored 49, an improvement of over 41%, ranking first among all participating solutions.

- Generation Efficiency: The original manual credit report writing takes an average of 5 working days (about 40 hours), while this solution generates reports in an average of ≤15 minutes, 33% shorter than the current industry intelligent process average generation time (about 20 minutes), significantly compressing the report production cycle; compared to manual review mode, intelligent report generation efficiency is improved by 160 times.
**Cost Optimization**:
- Operating Cost: This solution is compatible with base models such as MiniMax-M2 and GLM-4.7, reducing operating costs by nearly 60%.

- Labor Cost: The original manual solution requires 1+ week with multi-position collaboration (communication, research, proofreading, etc.), while this solution achieves report template coverage ≥95% and content accuracy > 90%, significantly saving human collaboration and composite time, reducing costs by about 80% compared to traditional mode.

subsections.title: 2.1 概况

- 关系挖掘不精准：产业链上下游、股权、技术合作等复杂关系依赖人工判断，易遗漏关键关联与潜在风险点

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能

- 动态可视化与交互：生成交互式图谱大屏，支持地理分布图层、价值流向标注、企业竞争格局展示，支持节点钻取与多维度筛选
- 智能分析报告导出：内置产业链价值分布、关键节点识别、风险传导模拟功能，一键导出产业分析报告与图谱可视化文件
- 快速更新迭代：支持数据增量更新与关系自动校验，每周可完成一次全图谱更新，响应产业动态变化

subsections.title: 2.7 核心业务指标

- 关系挖掘率>90%：从图谱中正确挖掘出上下游、合作、股权等关系的比例
- 数据更新响应时间<24小时：新增数据或政策变动后，图谱更新完成的时间
- 自定义维度的分析用时<3秒：用户发起特定维度分析（如区域分布、技术路线）后的响应速度
- 低代码配置效率提升>80%：相比传统编码开发，图谱模板配置与调整的效率提升比例

overview.highlight: Complete the full-process construction of a single national industrial chain knowledge graph in one week using low-code, covering the entire hierarchy of 'resources - materials - components - products - services', integrated with multi-source data automation, intelligent relationship mining, and dynamic visualization capabilities

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Complete the full-process construction of a single national industrial chain knowledge graph in one week using low-code, covering the entire hierarchy of 'resources-materials-components-products-services', integrated with multi-source data automation, intelligent relationship mining, and dynamic visualization capabilities

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Industrial chain knowledge graphs are core tools for industrial planning, investment attraction, and risk management. However, traditional construction models face challenges such as long cycles, scattered data, and delayed updates, making it difficult to adapt to complex industrial ecosystem analysis needs at the national level.

**Solution**: This case integrates knowledge graph frameworks, low-code development platforms, and multi-source data interfaces. Through template-based configuration, automatic information extraction, and human-machine collaborative verification, it can complete node organization, relationship construction, visualization presentation, and analysis report generation for a single national industrial chain within 7 days. It covers 230 million+ digital industrial products and 10 million+ core enterprise data, suitable for various industrial scenarios such as new energy, high-end manufacturing, and electronic information.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Finance & Trade, Energy & Manufacturing
**Category**: Service, Operations
**Technology**: Large Language Model (LLM), Knowledge Graph (KG), Agent, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction, Visualization & Design

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: ≤7 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Industrial Analyst, 1 Data Verification Specialist

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Long construction cycle: Traditional national industrial chain knowledge graph construction takes 2 months, relying heavily on manual organization, making it difficult to quickly respond to industrial dynamic changes

- Difficult data integration: National-level industrial data is scattered across official statistics, industry associations, commercial databases, and other channels, making heterogeneous data difficult to integrate uniformly

- Imprecise relationship mining: Complex relationships such as industrial chain upstream/downstream, equity, and technical cooperation rely on manual judgment, easily missing key connections and potential risk points
- High maintenance costs: Industrial nodes and relationships continue to iterate with policy and market changes; traditional models have long update cycles and high maintenance labor costs

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Low-code template configuration: Provides 30+ industry graph templates, supports custom node types, relationship rules, and visualization styles

- Intelligent graph generation: Automatically extracts industrial entities (enterprises, products, technologies), mines association relationships, and constructs 'six-dimensional hierarchy' (resources-materials-components-products-services-data) graphs

- Dynamic visualization and interaction: Generates interactive graph dashboards, supports geographic distribution layers, value flow annotations, enterprise competitive landscape display, and supports node drilling and multi-dimensional filtering

- Intelligent analysis report export: Built-in industrial chain value distribution, key node identification, risk transmission simulation functions, one-click export of industrial analysis reports and graph visualization files
- Rapid update iteration: Supports incremental data updates and automatic relationship verification, can complete a full graph update weekly, responding to industrial dynamic changes

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Business Metrics
content: - Graph construction cycle ≤7 days: Full process time from data ingestion to final graph delivery
- Entity coverage rate ≥92%: Proportion of covering national target industrial chain core segments, enterprises, products, and other entities
- Relationship mining rate >90%: Proportion of correctly mined upstream/downstream, cooperation, equity, and other relationships from the graph
- Data update response time <24 hours: Time to complete graph updates after new data or policy changes
- Custom dimension analysis time <3 seconds: Response speed after users initiate specific dimension analysis (such as regional distribution, technology routes)
- Low-code configuration efficiency improvement >80%: Efficiency improvement ratio of graph template configuration and adjustment compared to traditional coding development

subsections.title: 2.8 Core Technical Metrics
content: - Entity extraction accuracy >93%: Accuracy of industrial entity recognition and disambiguation based on large models
- Relation extraction F1 score >91%: Comprehensive evaluation metric for industrial chain complex relationship mining
- Data integration success rate >98%: Proportion of effective access and integration of multi-source heterogeneous data sources
- Graph visualization concurrent support >1000 users: User capacity simultaneously viewing and operating the graph online

- 便于分享：生成页面自带链接可供分享
- 便于修改：用户可继续与智能体对话以调整生成网页的细节

content: [实践详情](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/R9ncwRLzOiSjkuky1jHcCqfon7c?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: **核心业务指标**
- 交互响应延迟低于0.5秒，方便随时查看
- 所见即所得，从方案反馈到效果呈现越快越好，目前通常速度为1周，目标提效100%
- 降低前期50%人力成本
**核心技术指标**
- 生成页面内容完成率（相比输入的文字计划）达90%
- 生成页面内容准确率（相比输入的文字计划）达80%
**其他价值回报**
- 为独立工作与研发者提供练习方案
- 为UI及前端提供设计与实施灵感

overview.highlight: Build a business dashboard or website demo with basic interactivity in 1-2 days with zero technical threshold

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build a business dashboard or website demo with basic interactivity in 1-2 days with zero technical threshold

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: In recent years, small and medium-sized startups and many traditional enterprises have seen increasing demand for online promotional platforms, leading to massive demand for business dashboards and website development. Traditional solutions require coordinating multiple roles including product managers, UI designers, and technical staff, involving multiple steps such as website design, UI creation, frontend development (and backend development when necessary), resulting in high labor costs and long implementation cycles.

**Solution**: This case attempts to enable users to quickly build their conceived website text into a WYSIWYG demo through web-based interaction using AI agent technology powered by large language models, which can be shared with others for experience.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: General
**Category**: Service, Marketing, Operations
**Technology Category**: Visualization & Design, Agent, Context Engineering, Agent Applications, Frontend Design

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 2 Days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Stage: 1 Business Expert or Product Manager, no programming skills required

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - In recent years, small and medium-sized startups and many traditional enterprises have seen increasing demand for online promotional platforms, leading to massive demand for business dashboards and website development

- Traditional solutions require coordinating multiple roles including product managers, UI designers, and technical staff, involving multiple steps such as website design, UI creation, frontend development (and backend development when necessary), resulting in high labor costs and long implementation cycles
- Traditional solutions involve cumbersome communication during prototype modification and adjustment phases, unable to accurately achieve WYSIWYG results
- Traditional solutions may require coordinating frontend and backend resources during demonstration phases and ensuring viewer and user permissions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Page Generation: The agent generates pages based on user-provided prompts (which can also include uploaded materials like layout outlines for target pages)
- Page Interaction: Generated pages support basic frontend interaction effects (such as dropdowns, selections, search bars, simple conversations with bots, etc.)
- Real-time Editing: Users can continue interacting with the agent to update generated page effects
- Link Sharing: Page demos can generate corresponding links for easy sharing and presentation

subsections.title: 3.1 Version Information
content: - Practitioner Information: Real-World AI Self-developed and Verified
- Original Author English Name: Real-World AI
- Author Website: This Site
- Related References: Lovable Homepage: https://lovable.dev/
- Claude Code (by Anthropic) GitHub: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
- GLM-4.7(by Zhipu) GitHub: https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-4.5
- Initial Release Date: 2025-11-07
- Last Updated: 2026-02-02
- Last Reviewed: 2026-02-02

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Selection as Best Practice
content: - Convenient Operation: Users only need to log into the product webpage and follow the usage guide for interactive operations. Typically, 1 non-technical person can complete demo construction in 1-2 days
- Simple Requirements: Users only need to provide text materials (such as planned webpage outlines, expected website functions and purposes) and prompt instructions to the agent
- Easy Sharing: Generated pages come with links for sharing
- Easy Modification: Users can continue conversing with the agent to adjust details of generated webpages

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/R9ncwRLzOiSjkuky1jHcCqfon7c?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Interaction response latency below 0.5 seconds for convenient viewing anytime
- WYSIWYG, faster feedback to results presentation is better. Current typical speed is 1 week, target efficiency improvement of 100%
- Reduce前期 labor costs by 50%
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Generated page content completion rate (compared to input text plan) reaches 90%
- Generated page content accuracy rate (compared to input text plan) reaches 80%
**Other Value Returns**
- Provides practice solutions for independent workers and developers
- Provides design and implementation inspiration for UI and frontend

content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work corresponding to this case; skilled in communication; familiar with basic project management operations

- **Product Manager (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work corresponding to this case; skilled in communication; assists the business liaison in refining requirements and designing prototypes; this position can be provided by the contractor
- **UI Designer (x1)**: Familiar with user interface design; skilled in communication

- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with industry-standard technical architectures, processes, construction, and planning for the business work corresponding to this case; skilled in communication; familiar with basic project management operations; in this case, this can be directly handled by algorithm execution personnel (i.e., algorithm engineers, prompt engineers, etc.)

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: - The business liaison, product manager, and algorithm liaison conduct initial requirement contact and brainstorming sessions to identify the core requirements of this case
- The business liaison and algorithm liaison form a working group and communication channel, clarifying the liaison persons and contact methods

- The business liaison, together with the product manager (with UI designer support if necessary), clearly describes the functionality and effect plan of the target webpage to the algorithm liaison in text form
- Both parties communicate and supplement other materials needed for requirement confirmation, such as website page diagrams, detailed website functions, etc.
- The algorithm liaison evaluates the requirements based on the meeting content and the documents and materials provided

subsections.title: Implementation Content

- The algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items pending confirmation while conducting preliminary research, evaluation, and design of the solution

- The product manager communicates with the business liaison and algorithm liaison to organize and clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verification requirement document

- Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verification requirement document and plan schedules, budgets, and resources according to confirmed requirements. Schedule recommendation: First, the contractor completes preliminary verification, selection, and produces a Demo, with PoC as the first milestone; afterwards, both parties further negotiate formal project initiation

overview.industry: 信息技术,金融贸易,能源制造,行政管理

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周构建1个集文档结构化、章节完整性检查、关键内容风险项评估能力于一体的文档解析系统Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 文档的检查、审核和风险识别广泛应用于金融、医疗等行业，以及管理、运营等职能。本方案根据用户预设的规则与规范，自动解析用户输入的可编辑、半结构化PDF文件，对文件内容进行标题一致性、章节完整度等检查，并评估关键项的风险，最终将提取到的关键内容与评估结果生成JSON格式的报告输出。
**解决方案**: 私部署版：LangChain + GLM 4.7 + Pydantic + unstructured + Faiss

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，行政管理，金融贸易，能源制造
**应用类别**: 风控，管理，运营
**技术类别**: 自然语言处理（NLP），智能体（Agent），检索增强生成（RAG），信息抽取

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：3.5-5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工审查效率低下、成本较高：审核1份30-100页的专项方案文书，业务人员常需辅助进行搜索、核实、溯源、沟通等操作，花费3-5小时时间，专业文书对业务人员能力有较高要求
- 人工审查错误率高：1日内连续审核5+份文书，漏检风险上升约10%，可能导致严重安全事故和法律诉讼
- 人工审查可追溯性差：发现问题点后，可能协调运维等部门排查日志才能确定文档的操作记录，溯源依据获取难度高、效率低

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 结构化处理：将使用自然语言书写的原文按篇章布局整理为结构化文本段
- 智能章节检查：基于预置规范和标准，由工作流自动对文本篇章做完整性检查
- 智能风险评估：基于预置规范和标准，由工作流自动对文中指定的关键信息做风险评估
- 标准化输出：基于预置的格式模板输出结果

subsections.title: 3.1 版本信息
content: - 版本：私部署-服务器部署版
- 实践者信息：Real-World AI自研及验证
- 原作者信息：Real-World AI
- 关联引用：LangChain, Pydantic, unstructured, Faiss, GLM-4.7

subsections.title: 3.1.2 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 开源稳定：该方案使用开源、成熟的LangChain框架（在知名代码资源平台GitHub拥有 120K+标星数、90M+月下载量）构建智能工作流，并使用与之兼容、效果完善的Python库（如GitHub标星数25.8K+的Pydantic），整体运行稳定、易于维护
- 泛用性强：该方案技术层面采用了 Unstructured.io 的布局感知技术，其在复杂表格提取任务上的F1 值高达84.4%，显著优于经典工具如PyMuPDF等；业务层面，该方案自带的结构化解析文档、规范化输出模块均面向通用可编辑PDF文档，只需调整提示词等预设任务，即可广泛适用于各垂直领域的丰富场景
- 高效简洁：该方案对编程能力要求适中，只需要按本指南来搭建流程并做好配置，即可快速完成Demo

subsections.title: 3.1.3 实施详情
content: [实践详情](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/BQlFwLeAfiQlMHkPg5zc10P4nKb?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: **核心业务指标**:
- 审核1份30-100页文档时间缩短90%
- 文书审核流程人力成本减少80%
- 文书审核流程人为误差降低80%
**核心技术指标**:
- 章节完整度判断（F1宏平均）≥99%
- 目标字段相似度匹配准确率（Jaro-Winkler值）≥ 0.95
- 文本摘要生成（Ragas Faithfulness值） ≥ 0.98
- JSON文档格式规范程度 ≥ 100%

steps.title: SOTA文档解析层：布局感知解析

subsections.title: 步骤定义
content: 使用 unstructured.io 库对输入的PDF文档进行深度布局感知解析，将其转换为结构化的语义元素（Elements）。

subsections.title: 参与人员
content: 角色名称：AI算法工程师
技能要求：
熟悉 unstructured.io 库
理解不同解析策略（fast vs hi_res）对性能和准确率的影响
熟悉LangChain的DocumentLoader（文档加载器）接口
角色数量：1

subsections.title: 本步输入
content: 输入名称：PDF文档
输入介绍：复杂的、包含文本、表格、多级标题的半结构化PDF

subsections.title: 本步产出
content: 输出名称：结构化文档元素列表 (List of unstructured.documents.elements.Element)
输出介绍：一个Python列表，其中每个元素都被分类为 Title, NarrativeText, Table 等，为后续的语义分块和检索奠定基础。

subsections.title: 步骤定义
content: 根据目标接口文档，使用 Pydantic 定义一个严格对应的、包含嵌套模型的Python BaseModel 类。

subsections.title: 参与人员
content: 角色名称：AI算法工程师 / 后端工程师
技能要求：
精通 Pydantic BaseModel 定义
能够将JSON schema翻译为 BaseModel，包括 Field 定义、类型提示（typing.List, typing.bool）和嵌套模型
角色数量：1

subsections.title: 本步输入
content: 输入名称：API接口文档
输入介绍：目标JSON输出的详细schema，包括所有键、值类型和嵌套结构
输入示例：
completeness_check.sections 的Pydantic定义
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import bool
class CompletenessSections(BaseModel):
info_introduction: bool = Field(..., description="文档是否包含'摘要'章节")
info_method: bool = Field(..., description="文档是否包含'实施方案'章节")
info_dataset: bool = Field(..., description="文档是否包含'数据介绍'章节")
info_settings: bool = Field(..., description="文档是否包含'实施配置'章节")

subsections.title: 本步产出
content: 输出名称：DocumentCheckResult Pydantic 模型 (Python Class)
输出介绍：一个可直接被LangChain的with_structured_output 调用的Python类，用于强制LLM输出合规的JSON

subsections.title: 本步产出
content: 输出名称：符合规范的Pydantic对象（可序列化为JSON）
输出介绍：对输入文档进行完整分析后，由SOTA RAG管道生成的、100%符合schema的结构化数据，可直接用于API返回。

overview.highlight: Build a document parsing system demo with document structuring, chapter completeness checks, and key content risk assessment capabilities in one week
overview.industry: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Energy & Manufacturing, Administration

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build a document parsing system demo with document structuring, chapter completeness checks, and key content risk assessment capabilities in one week

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Document review, audit, and risk identification are widely applied in industries such as finance and healthcare, as well as in management and operations functions. This solution automatically parses user-inputted editable, semi-structured PDF files based on preset rules and specifications, checks for title consistency and chapter completeness, assesses risks of key items, and finally generates reports in JSON format with extracted key content and assessment results.
**Solution**: Private Deployment: LangChain + GLM 4.7 + Pydantic + unstructured + Faiss

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Administration, Finance & Trade, Energy & Manufacturing
**Category**: Risk Control, Management, Operations
**Technology**: Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Information Extraction

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency and high cost of manual review: Reviewing a 30-100 page specialized document requires business personnel to perform searches, verifications, traceability checks, and communications, taking 3-5 hours. Professional documents require high competency from business personnel.

- High error rate in manual review: Continuously reviewing 5+ documents per day increases the risk of missed detections by about 10%, potentially leading to serious safety incidents and legal proceedings.

- Poor traceability in manual review: After discovering issues, it may require coordination with operations and other departments to check logs to determine document operation records, making it difficult and inefficient to obtain traceability evidence.

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Structured Processing: Organize original text written in natural language into structured text segments according to chapter layout
- Intelligent Chapter Check: Automatically perform completeness checks on text chapters based on preset specifications and standards via workflow
- Intelligent Risk Assessment: Automatically assess risks of specified key information in the text based on preset specifications and standards via workflow
- Standardized Output: Output results based on preset format templates

subsections.title: 3.1 Version Information
content: - Version: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- Practitioner Information: Real-World AI Self-developed and Verified
- Original Author Information: Real-World AI
- Initial Release Date: 2025-11-14
- Last Updated: 2026-02-02
- Last Reviewed: 2026-02-02
- Related References: LangChain, Pydantic, unstructured, Faiss, GLM-4.7

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Selection as Best Practice
content: - Open Source and Stable: This solution uses the open-source, mature LangChain framework (with 120K+ stars and 90M+ monthly downloads on GitHub) to build intelligent workflows, and uses compatible, well-functioning Python libraries (such as Pydantic with 25.8K+ GitHub stars), ensuring stable operation and easy maintenance.

- High Versatility: Technically, this solution adopts Unstructured.io's layout-aware technology, achieving an F1 score of 84.4% on complex table extraction tasks, significantly outperforming classic tools like PyMuPDF. Business-wise, the solution's structured document parsing and standardized output modules are designed for general editable PDF documents, requiring only prompt adjustments to be widely applicable across various vertical domains.
- Efficient and Simple: This solution has moderate programming requirements. Simply follow this guide to set up the process and configure it properly to quickly complete the demo.

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/BQlFwLeAfiQlMHkPg5zc10P4nKb?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:
- Review time for 30-100 page documents reduced by 90%
- Document review process labor costs reduced by 80%
- Document review process human error reduced by 80%
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Chapter completeness judgment (F1 macro average) ≥ 99%
- Target field similarity matching accuracy (Jaro-Winkler value) ≥ 0.95
- Text summary generation (Ragas Faithfulness value) ≥ 0.98
- JSON document format compliance ≥ 100%

phases.title: PHASE 1 Requirement Identification and Team Building

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making pathways of the business work corresponding to this case, skilled in communication, familiar with basic project management and product requirement organization methods

**Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Usually the technical liaison and person in charge for the final engineering implementation of this case, assisting the business liaison in technical-level communication

**Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the industry-standard technical architecture and processes, construction and planning for the business work corresponding to this case, skilled in communication, and has strong execution capabilities

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: The business liaison and technical liaison conduct initial requirement contact and brainstorming sessions with the algorithm liaison to organize the core requirements of this case
The business liaison and algorithm liaison form a working group and contact group, clarifying the liaisons and contact methods
The business liaison clearly describes in text form to the algorithm liaison the objectives and expected outcomes of this document parsing task

Both parties communicate to supplement other materials needed for requirement confirmation, such as sample documents, target field lists, example outputs, document parsing business rules and experiences, etc.
The algorithm liaison conducts requirement assessment based on the meeting content and feedback documents and materials from both parties

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

**Business Expert (x1)**: Leader, executor, or expert involved in core business modules of the business work corresponding to this case, assisting the business liaison in clarifying business pain points and value

**Product Manager (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making pathways of the business work corresponding to this case, skilled in communication, assisting the business liaison in refining requirements and designing prototypes, this position can be provided by the undertaking party
**Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
**Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

**Algorithm Expert (x1)**: Familiar with current industry cutting-edge and general technical solutions and selections across various scenarios and applications, assisting the algorithm liaison in assessing requirements, coordinating team research, designing solutions and architectures, and assisting in schedule evaluation

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: The business liaison communicates with their business experts and related teams to confirm the expected goals and business value of this solution implementation. Business value should be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current numbers, expected target achievements, expected degree of improvement compared to current status, etc.)
The algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list pending confirmation items while conducting preliminary research, assessment, and design of the solution

The product manager communicates with the business liaison and algorithm liaison to organize and clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verify requirement document

Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verify requirement document, and plan schedules, budgets, and resources according to confirmed requirements. Schedule recommendation: First, take the contractor's completion of preliminary verification, selection, Demo production, and passing PoC as the first milestone; afterwards, both parties further negotiate formal project initiation and implementation
Repeat the above steps until the preliminary verify requirement document is finalized

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: Resource preparation and environment configuration
Use the unstructured.io library to perform deep layout-aware parsing of input PDF documents, converting them into structured semantic elements (Elements)
According to the target interface document, use the Pydantic library to define a strictly corresponding Python BaseModel class containing nested models

Use LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) to orchestrate a complete Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline: parser -> chunker -> retriever -> prompt -> base model -> structured output parser, to automatically process PDFs and generate target JSON
The algorithm team writes the preliminary verify report
Complete PoC
Both parties maintain close communication to confirm whether to formally initiate the project
If planning to formally initiate the project, both parties adjust the Demo effect plan, finalize the project initiation report, and prepare the project initiation agreement and startup matters

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Configure Python 3.10+ environment and install all core libraries required for the SOTA pipeline.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Algorithm Engineer
Skills Required:
Familiar with Python virtual environment management (venv or conda)
Familiar with pip and other package management tools, including handling complex peer dependencies
Number of Roles: 1 person

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: requirements.txt file
Input Description:
Contains all required Python packages, especially unstructured and its additional dependencies for PDF parsing
Input Example:
# Orchestration and Core Logic
langchain
langchain-community
pydantic
# LLM and Embeddings (using Ollama and open-source models as examples)
langchain-ollama
transformers
accelerate
sentence-transformers
# SOTA Parsing Layer
unstructured[pdf] # Key: [pdf] includes PDF parsing dependencies
# Retrieval Layer
faiss-cpu

transformers Github: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers

content: 0.5 days

steps.title: SOTA Document Parsing Layer: Layout-Aware Parsing

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Use the unstructured.io library to perform deep layout-aware parsing on input PDF documents, converting them into structured semantic elements.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: AI Algorithm Engineer
Skills Required:
Familiar with unstructured.io library
Understand the impact of different parsing strategies (fast vs hi_res) on performance and accuracy
Familiar with LangChain's DocumentLoader interface
Number of Roles: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: PDF Document
Input Description: Complex semi-structured PDF containing text, tables, and multi-level headings

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Structured Document Element List (List of unstructured.documents.elements.Element)
Output Description: A Python list where each element is classified as Title, NarrativeText, Table, etc., laying the foundation for subsequent semantic chunking and retrieval.

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5-1 days

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Define a strictly corresponding Python BaseModel class with nested models using Pydantic based on the target API documentation.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: AI Algorithm Engineer / Backend Engineer
Skills Required:
Proficient in Pydantic BaseModel definition
Able to translate JSON schema into BaseModel, including Field definitions, type hints (typing.List, typing.bool), and nested models
Number of Roles: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: API Interface Documentation
Input Description: Detailed schema of the target JSON output, including all keys, value types, and nested structures
Input Example:
Pydantic definition for completeness_check.sections
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import bool
class CompletenessSections(BaseModel):
info_introduction: bool = Field(..., description="Whether the document contains 'Abstract' section")
info_method: bool = Field(..., description="Whether the document contains 'Implementation Method' section")
info_dataset: bool = Field(..., description="Whether the document contains 'Data Introduction' section")
info_settings: bool = Field(..., description="Whether the document contains 'Implementation Configuration' section")

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: DocumentCheckResult Pydantic Model (Python Class)
Output Description: A Python class that can be directly called by LangChain's with_structured_output to enforce LLM output compliance with JSON

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 1-1.5 days

steps.title: Build and Execute E2E Intelligent Processing Chain

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Use LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) to orchestrate a complete RAG pipeline: Parser -> Chunker -> Retriever -> Prompt -> Base Model -> Structured Output Parser, to automatically process PDF and generate target JSON.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Algorithm Engineer
Skills Required:
Proficient in LangChain (LCEL), understanding RunnableParallel and RunnablePassthrough
Familiar with using with_structured_output and able to bind it with Pydantic models.
Advanced Prompt Engineering capabilities, able to write complex instructions to guide LLM to complete multiple tasks simultaneously (classification, summarization, extraction).
Number of Roles: 1 person

subsections.title: Input
content: Input Name: PDF File Storage Path, Pydantic Model, LLM Instance
Input Description: All outputs from steps 1, 2, and 3, plus an initialized LangChain LLM instance (such as a ChatOllama instance pointing to a local Qwen model).

subsections.title: Output
content: Output Name: Compliant Pydantic Object (serializable to JSON)
Output Description: Structured data that is 100% schema-compliant, generated by the SOTA RAG pipeline after complete analysis of the input document, ready for API response.

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 1.5-2 days

overview.highlight: 最快2.5日内生成1个企业级产品或功能简要演示视频
overview.industry: 信息技术，金融贸易，科研教育

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 最快2.5日内生成1个企业级产品或功能简要演示视频

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 中小量级公司对自家产品功能演示的需求始终保持旺盛，但预算有限，常需在高质量视频制作与高成本投入之间取舍。传统人工制作该类视频，至少需要录制、剪辑（可能含配乐）、配音等人员，人力成本较高，通常在100-1500元/分钟甚至更高，且剪辑素材、音频处理（去噪、对轴、配乐等）用时较长，通常从准备到完成约为7+日，若成品需要调整较为困难。
**解决方案**: 本方案根据用户录制的视频素材及文字输入的需求设置，自动生成含有语音、字幕、背景音乐的介绍视频。通过Claude Code调用整合多个MCP服务完成，基于ASR技术将视频原声转为字幕，基于TTS技术生成语音，基于音乐生成技术生成背景音乐，整合字幕、语音、背景音乐和原始视频，生成新的介绍视频。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，金融贸易，科研教育
**应用类别**: 服务，运营，营销
**技术类别**: MCP工具，计算机视觉，语音与音频，ASR，TTS

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：2.5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 中小量级公司对自家产品功能演示的需求始终保持旺盛，但预算有限，常需在高质量视频制作与高成本投入之间取舍
- 传统人工制作该类视频，至少需要录制、剪辑（可能含配乐）、配音等人员，人力成本较高，通常在100-1500元/分钟甚至更高
- 传统人工制作该类视频，剪辑素材、音频处理（去噪、对轴、配乐等）用时较长，通常从准备到完成约为7+日
- 传统人工制作该视频，若成品需要调整较为困难

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 基于ASR技术将视频原声转为字幕
- 基于TTS技术基于字幕生成语音
- 基于音乐生成技术基于字幕与用户告知的指令生成背景音乐
- 整合字幕、语音、背景音乐和原始视频，生成新的介绍视频

subsections.title: 3.1 版本信息
content: - 实践者信息：Real-World AI自研及验证
- 原作者中文名称：/
- 原作者英文名称：Real-World AI

- 关联引用：Claude Code (by Anthropic) GitHub：https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code

subsections.title: 3.1.2 入选最佳实践理由
content: - 开源稳定：该方案使用开源、成熟的Claude Code调用、整合多个MCP服务完成
- SOTA MCP：所选MCP工具覆盖语音识别、文字生成语音、音乐生成等功能，均为近期在业界权威第三方资源平台（如Github、Huggingface等）关注量排名Top5、广受好评的工具
- 高效：经实际验证，在需求明确的前提下，该方案能快至两天半完成，是目前开源服务器部署版中最快的方案

subsections.title: 3.1.3 实施详情
content: [实践详情](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/Zb81wx72QiLt5xkCYO4cgzeen6g?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 指标
content: **核心业务指标**
- 音画字同步，视频清晰、播放流畅，满足预期质量，最好带有配乐等加成效果
- 制作过程中响应及时、修改调整快捷，1周内完成定稿
- 制作成本控制在1000元内
- 视频时长约为1分钟
**核心技术指标**
- 字错率（CER）<=5%
- 平均识别准确率（Acc）>= 75%
- 平均识别速度（RTF）<= 0.5
- 语音自然度（Naturalness）主观抽检通过

phases.title: PHASE 1 需求识别与团队构建

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - **业务对接人（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作
- **产品经理（x1）**：通常为该视频录制功能点的产品负责人，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通
- **业务侧技术对接人（x1）**：通常为该视频录制功能点的技术负责人，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通
- **算法对接人（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，有执行力

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: - 业务对接人、产品经理与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
- 业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
- 业务对接人协同产品经理（必要时业务侧技术对接人参与支持）以文本形式向算法对接人清晰描述目标视频的内容与效果方案
- 双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如视频剧本、文案、视效材料等
- 算法对接人根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

subsections.title: 相关资源
content: - 脑图绘制工具：https://xmind.cn/ 或 飞书文档「画板」与「思维导图」功能
- 剧本及文案撰写工具：Word、Excel、WPS等

subsections.title: 结果产出
content: - 成立工作组，明确对接人与联络方式
- 完成项目合作需求填写（即目标视频规划），对需求有初步梳理

- **产品经理（x1）**：同PHASE 1
- **业务侧技术对接人（x1）**：同PHASE 1

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: - 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）

overview.highlight: Generate an enterprise-level product or feature demo video in as little as 2.5 days
overview.industry: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Research & Education

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Generate an enterprise-level product or feature demo video in as little as 2.5 days

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Small and medium-sized companies have consistently strong demand for product feature demonstrations, but limited budgets often force them to choose between high-quality video production and high costs. Traditional manual video production requires at least recording, editing (possibly including music), and voice-over personnel, with high labor costs typically ranging from 100-1500 RMB per minute or even higher. Additionally, editing materials and audio processing (noise reduction, synchronization, music composition, etc.) take considerable time, usually 7+ days from preparation to completion, and adjustments to the final product are difficult.

**Solution**: This solution automatically generates introduction videos with voice-over, subtitles, and background music based on user-recorded video materials and text input requirements. Through Claude Code calling and integrating multiple MCP services, it uses ASR technology to convert video audio to subtitles, TTS technology to generate speech, music generation technology to create background music, and integrates subtitles, speech, background music, and original video to generate new introduction videos.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Finance & Trade, Research & Education
**Application**: Service, Operations, Marketing
**Technology**: MCP Tools, Computer Vision, Speech & Audio, ASR, TTS

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 2.5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Small and medium-sized companies have consistently strong demand for product feature demonstrations, but limited budgets often force them to choose between high-quality video production and high costs

- Traditional manual video production requires at least recording, editing (possibly including music), and voice-over personnel, with high labor costs typically ranging from 100-1500 RMB per minute or even higher
- Traditional manual video production involves lengthy editing and audio processing (noise reduction, synchronization, music composition, etc.), usually taking 7+ days from preparation to completion
- Traditional manual video production makes it difficult to adjust the final product

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Features
content: - Convert video audio to subtitles using ASR technology
- Generate speech from subtitles using TTS technology
- Generate background music based on subtitles and user instructions using music generation technology
- Integrate subtitles, speech, background music, and original video to generate new introduction videos

content: - Practitioner Information: Real-World AI Self-developed and Verified

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Open Source and Stable: This solution uses open-source, mature Claude Code to call and integrate multiple MCP services

- SOTA MCP: The selected MCP tools cover speech recognition, text-to-speech, music generation, and other functions, all ranking in the Top 5 by attention on authoritative third-party platforms (such as GitHub, Huggingface) and widely acclaimed
- Efficient: Verified in practice, this solution can be completed in as little as 2.5 days with clear requirements, making it the fastest among open-source server deployment solutions

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/Zb81wx72QiLt5xkCYO4cgzeen6g?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Audio-video-subtitle synchronization, clear video quality, smooth playback, meeting expected quality standards, preferably with background music and other enhancements
- Timely response during production, quick modifications and adjustments, final delivery within 1 week
- Production cost controlled within 1000 RMB
- Video duration approximately 1 minute
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Character Error Rate (CER) <= 5%
- Average Recognition Accuracy (Acc) >= 75%
- Average Recognition Speed (RTF) <= 0.5
- Speech Naturalness (Naturalness) passes subjective sampling inspection

phases.title: PHASE 1 Requirements Identification and Team Building

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work related to this case; skilled in communication; familiar with basic project management operations
- **Product Manager (x1)**: Typically the product owner of the video recording functionality; skilled in communication; assists the business liaison in technical-level communication
- **Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Typically the technical lead of the video recording functionality; supports the business liaison in technical-level communication

- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with industry-standard technical architectures, processes, construction, and planning related to this business case; skilled in communication; has strong execution capability

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: - Business liaison, product manager, and algorithm liaison conduct initial requirement discussions and brainstorming sessions to identify core requirements of this case
- Business liaison and algorithm liaison form a working group and communication channel, clarifying the liaisons and contact methods

- Business liaison, together with the product manager (with support from business-side technical liaison when necessary), clearly describes the content and effect plan of the target video to the algorithm liaison in text format
- Both parties communicate and supplement other materials needed for requirement confirmation, such as video scripts, copywriting, visual materials, etc.
- Algorithm liaison conducts requirement assessment based on meeting notes and provided documents and materials from both parties

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Mind mapping tools: https://xmind.cn/ or Feishu Docs "Canvas" and "Mind Map" features
- Script and copywriting tools: Word, Excel, WPS, etc.

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: - Establish working group, clarify liaisons and contact methods
- Complete project cooperation requirement form (i.e., target video plan), with preliminary organization of requirements

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: 1-2 days

phases.title: PHASE 2 Value Confirmation and Requirement Refinement

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Business Expert (x1)**: Leader, executor, or expert involved in core business modules related to this case; assists the business liaison in clarifying business pain points and values
- **Product Manager (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: - Business liaison communicates with their business experts and related teams to confirm expected goals and business value of this solution implementation; business value should be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current numbers, expected targets, expected improvement compared to current status, etc.)
- Algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items pending confirmation, while conducting preliminary research, assessment, and design of the solution

overview.highlight: 一周搭建儿童教育趣味应用Demo
overview.tech_category: 自然语言处理，文本生成，智能问答

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周搭建一个儿童教育应用Demo

subsections.title: 概况
content: - 快速搭建儿童智力启蒙趣味性应用（这里以脑筋急转弯为例）。通过AI技术生成反常规思维类、逻辑推理类不同题型。

subsections.title: 分类标签
content: - 行业类别：科研教育，文化体育
- 应用类别：服务
- 技术类别：自然语言处理，文本生成，智能问答

subsections.title: 实施周期
content: - Demo搭建：一周内

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名

subsections.title: 业务痛点
content: - 全人工教培通常将该类问答融入游戏过程中，不能独立体验，缺乏灵活性
- 人工教培使类似问答服务难以触达更广大潜在用户群体
- 拥有教培问答经验与知识的非技术人员难以开发一套应用

subsections.title: 核心功能
content: - 交互支持：
- 换题目（保持新鲜感）
- 多次猜测（鼓励尝试）
- 询问答案（即时反馈）
- 质疑问题（培养批判性思维）
- 构建完整的智力训练体验

subsections.title: 核心业务指标
content: - 问答响应延迟低于1秒
- 支持与用户连续互动轮次达到5轮

subsections.title: 核心技术指标
content: - 单轮平均回答准确率达到90%

subsections.title: 其他价值回报
content: - 可作为大模型爱好者的第1套搭建工作流练手项目
- 为有需求的家长提供一套0门槛搭建自用趣味应用的方案

subsections.title: 3.1 私部署-服务器部署版
content: - 入选最佳实践理由：该版本在目前开源方案中工作流最完整、搭建过程最简洁、搭建时间最短。版本基于BISHENG工作流平台搭建，只需按步骤完成配置即可实现无代码构建问答大模型。
- 实践者信息：Real-World AI转载及验证
- 原作者信息：zh
- 作者网站：手搓100个Workflow【活动】（表格最后一行，作者为zh）
- 关联引用：
- BISHENG(by 毕昇) GitHub：https://github.com/dataelement/bisheng
- GLM-4.7(by 智谱) GitHub：https://github.com/zai-org/GLM-4.5
- 版本状态：
- 实施详情：https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/J4ucwrsuJiWRuWkffSpcly50n7d?from=from_copylink

phases.title: PHASE 1 需求识别与团队构建

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: **业务对接人（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作
**业务侧技术对接人（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作实际在用/预期涉及的技术功能与流程、建设与规划，辅助业务对接人在技术层面的沟通，建议首选架构师或技术型项目经理，其次为具体技术执行人员（如后端工程师等）
**算法对接人（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的业界通行技术架构与流程、建设与规划，擅长沟通，熟悉项目管理基本操作

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 业务对接人与算法对接人进行初次需求接触与头脑风暴交流，梳理该案例的核心需求
业务对接人与算法对接人组建工作组及联络群，明确明确对接人与联络方式
业务对接人（代表需求方团队）填写算法对接人（代表承做方团队）提供的项目合作需求问询书；如果已有较明确的构想、能拆解出多个子任务，可进一步填写子任务算法需求模板
双方沟通补充需求确认所需的其他材料，如样例数据、专业知识参考资料等
算法对接人协调自己团队，根据双方会议内容及反馈的文档和材料，展开需求评估

content: 成立工作组，明确对接人与联络方式
完成项目合作需求问询书（及子任务算法需求模板）填写，对需求有初步梳理

phases.title: PHASE 2 价值确认与需求细化

subsections.title: 团队构成
content: **业务对接人（x1）**：同PHASE 1
**业务侧技术对接人（x1）**：同PHASE 1
**业务专家（x1）**：该案例对应业务工作中涉及核心业务模块的领导者、执行者或专家，协助业务对接人明确业务痛点与价值
**产品经理（x1）**：熟悉该案例对应业务工作的组织、流程、决策链路，擅长沟通，协助业务对接人细化需求，并设计原型，该职位可由承做方提供
**算法对接人（x1）**：同PHASE 1
**算法专家（x1）**：熟悉各场景与应用中业界目前的前沿与通用技术方案及选型，协助算法对接人评估需求，协调团队进行调研、设计方案与架构，协助评估排期

subsections.title: 实施内容
content: 业务对接人与己方业务专家及相关团队沟通，确认该方案实施的预期目标及业务价值，业务价值需要尽可能量化，并有对比数据（如现状数字、预期达成目标、预期相比现状改善的程度等）
算法对接人与己方算法专家及相关团队沟通，罗列待确认事项，同时对方案进行初步调研、评估、设计
产品经理与业务对接人和算法对接人沟通、梳理并明确需求，之后组织双方相关人员撰写初步验证需求文档
双方根据初步验证需求文档进行需求确认，根据确认的需求规划排期、预算和资源。排期建议：首先以承接方完成初步验证、选型、产出Demo，并通过PoC为首个里程碑；之后双方进一步协商正式立项实施
重复以上步骤直至初步验证需求文档定稿
