overview.highlight: Build a Children's Educational Fun App Demo in One Week
overview.tech_category: Natural Language Processing, Text Generation, Intelligent Q&A

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build a children's educational app demo in one week

subsections.title: Overview
content: - Rapidly build a children's intellectual enlightenment fun application (using brain teasers as an example). Generate unconventional thinking and logical reasoning questions of different types through AI technology.

subsections.title: Classification Tags
content: - Industry: Scientific Research & Education, Culture & Sports
- Application: Service
- Technology: Natural Language Processing, Text Generation, Intelligent Q&A

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Build: Within one week

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - Demo Stage: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Expert

subsections.title: Business Pain Points
content: - Traditional manual education typically integrates such Q&A into game processes, preventing independent experience and lacking flexibility
- Manual education makes it difficult for similar Q&A services to reach a broader potential user base
- Non-technical personnel with educational Q&A experience and knowledge struggle to develop such applications

subsections.title: Core Functions
content: - Interaction Support:
- Change questions (maintain freshness)
- Multiple guesses (encourage attempts)
- Ask for answers (immediate feedback)
- Challenge questions (cultivate critical thinking)
- Build a complete intellectual training experience

subsections.title: Core Business Metrics
content: - Q&A response latency under 1 second
- Support up to 5 rounds of continuous interaction with users

subsections.title: Core Technical Metrics
content: - Single-round average answer accuracy reaches 90%

subsections.title: Other Value Returns
content: - Can serve as the first workflow practice project for LLM enthusiasts
- Provides a zero-barrier solution for parents in need to build their own fun applications

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: - Reason for Best Practice Selection: This version has the most complete workflow, simplest setup process, and shortest build time among current open-source solutions. Built on the BISHENG workflow platform, it enables no-code construction of Q&A large models by following step-by-step configuration.

The product manager communicates with the business liaison and algorithm liaison to organize and clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verification requirements document

Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verify requirements document, and plan schedules, budgets, and resources based on confirmed requirements. subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周用低代码快速构建并验证一个面向能源领域的长时间序列预测（LTSF）系统Demo，用于实现能源指标的监测、预警等功能

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 长时序预测任务广泛用于能源等领域的各类特征指标的监测与预警场景，方便人们根据预测趋势及时察觉风险与异常、进而作出调整。
**解决方案**: 本例面向智慧能源（如电、水、天然气等）场景，输入该场景中指定特征的历史序列数据，输出未来长时间段内多个时间节点的预测值，通过引入2025年最新时序模型，捕捉长周期异常状态，为能源调度与管控提供可信决策依据。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 能源制造
**应用类别**: 运营，风控
**技术类别**: 统计机器学习，大语言模型（LLM），运维（测试&监控），时序预测

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：3-5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工预测成本高误差大：人工预测需依赖从业人员经验，资深专家成本高，且无法同时持续对多类指标进行跟踪预测；普通人员判断能力有限，误差大
- 长周期预测稳定性差：现有模型在预测未来720+时间点时，随着预测步长增加，误差显著放大，难以捕捉关键的周期性和突发异常，导致预警失效
- 交付可信度低：现有各技术方案缺乏统一自动化基准测试流程，各机构组织的对比报告指标与结果各异，为技术选型与最佳实践带来困扰

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 零样本长程预测：在未见过的新业务数据上稳定输出未来720+时间点的预测值
- 智能排序选型：自动对比指定的各时序预测主流模型，生成排名结果，提供选型依据

subsections.title: 2.7 核心指标
content: **核心业务指标**:
- 方案选型可信度提升10%（对比算法研究员）至70%（对比非算法从业人员），让业务人员也能快速、准确做出选择
- 方案选型、迁移成本降低50%
- 平均绝对误差（MAE）< 0.39，降低能源领域因长时预测误差带来的损失约5%
**核心技术指标**:
- 平均绝对误差（MAE）< 0.39

subsections.title: 3.1.2 入选最佳实践理由
content: **指标提升**:
- 在所选能源场景的行业核心基准跑测中，该方案的平均绝对误差（MAE）指标为38.4%，相比2024年此评测的SOTA方法iTransformer和PatchTST方法分别降低了5.2%与3.6%

**成本优化**:
- 选型与决策成本：方案选型与迁移成本降低50%。通过内置的自动化基准测试，方案选型可信度提升了10%（对比算法研究员）至70%（对比非算法从业人员），使得非技术背景的业务人员也能快速、准确地做出最佳技术决策
- 该方案的零样本学习能力，预估可降低50%的模型冷启动微调成本与数据标注成本

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build and validate a Long-term Time Series Forecasting (LTSF) system demo for the energy sector in one week using low-code approach, enabling energy metrics monitoring and early warning

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Long-term time series forecasting tasks are widely used in monitoring and early warning scenarios for various feature indicators in energy and other fields, enabling people to detect risks and anomalies in time based on predicted trends and make adjustments accordingly.

**Solution**: This case targets smart energy scenarios (such as electricity, water, natural gas, etc.), taking historical sequence data of specified features as input, and outputting predicted values for multiple time points in the future long-term period. By introducing the latest 2025 time series models, it captures long-period anomaly states and provides credible decision-making basis for energy scheduling and control.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Energy Manufacturing
**Category**: Operations, Risk Control
**Technology Category**: Statistical Machine Learning, Large Language Model (LLM), Operations (Testing & Monitoring), Time Series Forecasting

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 3-5 Days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Stage: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - High Cost and Large Error in Manual Prediction: Manual prediction relies on practitioner experience, senior experts are costly, and cannot continuously track and predict multiple indicators simultaneously; ordinary personnel have limited judgment ability with large errors

- Poor Stability in Long-term Prediction: Existing models show significantly amplified errors as prediction steps increase when forecasting 720+ future time points, failing to capture critical periodicity and sudden anomalies, leading to early warning failures

- Low Delivery Credibility: Existing technical solutions lack unified automated benchmarking processes, with various organizations producing different comparison report indicators and results, causing difficulties in technology selection and best practices

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Zero-shot Long-term Forecasting: Stably output predicted values for 720+ future time points on unseen new business data
- Intelligent Ranking and Selection: Automatically compare specified mainstream time series forecasting models, generate ranking results, and provide selection basis

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:
- Solution selection credibility improved by 10% (compared to algorithm researchers) to 70% (compared to non-algorithm practitioners), enabling business personnel to make quick and accurate choices
- Solution selection and migration costs reduced by 50%
- Mean Absolute Error (MAE) < 0.39, reducing losses caused by long-term prediction errors in the energy sector by about 5%
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Mean Absolute Error (MAE) < 0.39

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Selection as Best Practice
content: **Metric Improvements**:

- In the industry core benchmark testing for the selected energy scenario, the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of this solution is 38.4%, which is 5.2% and 3.6% lower than the 2024 SOTA methods iTransformer and PatchTST respectively

- Based on the above accuracy improvement, it is estimated to reduce business losses caused by long-term prediction errors by about 5%, effectively supporting the business value transformation from 'fuzzy trend prediction' to 'precise quantitative risk control'

- In Zero-Shot learning, this solution performs comparably to the PatchTST solution requiring full training, reducing business-side migration costs by 50% and quickly covering various data-scarce scenarios
**Cost Optimization**:

- Selection and Decision Costs: Solution selection and migration costs reduced by 50%. Through built-in automated benchmarking, solution selection credibility improved by 10% (compared to algorithm researchers) to 70% (compared to non-algorithm practitioners), enabling non-technical background business personnel to quickly and accurately make optimal technical decisions
- The zero-shot learning capability of this solution is estimated to reduce model cold-start fine-tuning costs and data labeling costs by 50%
- Due to the low-code nature of the open-source framework, this solution only takes 3-5 days to complete demo development, shortening the validation cycle from 2-3 weeks to within 1 week
**Additional Information**:

- The core model EMTSF (MoE) of this solution performs excellently on authoritative public benchmarks such as ETTh1, with Mean Absolute Error (MAE) metrics comprehensively outperforming previous years' models, and was rated as the dual-path SOTA architecture in the 2025 Long-term Time Series Forecasting (LTSF) field

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周快速构建1个智能文档翻译Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 文本翻译任务广泛应用于日常办公、跨国商务沟通、科研论文撰写与阅读、产品本地化、运营内容多区域分发等场景，在信息技术，金融贸易，科研教育，文化传媒等行业具有极高的使用频率与刚性需求。除了文本片段翻译外，真实业务流程还期望有对Word、PDF、Markdown等多种可编辑格式文档的高效翻译方案。
**解决方案**: 本例提出可私部署的智能翻译流程，基于当前综合翻译能力处于SOTA水平的Gemini 3 Pro大模型，结合Gemini CLI与可配置提示词配置文件，实现从文本输入、智能翻译、质量评估到结果输出的一体化翻译流程。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，行政管理，金融贸易，科研教育，文化传媒
**应用类别**: 服务，运营，管理
**技术类别**: 大语言模型（LLM），自然语言处理（NLP），智能体（Agent），MCP工具，多语言学习，机器翻译，API集成

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：3.5-5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 效率低：人工处理多种格式文档时，常需反复复制粘贴内容到翻译工具，20页文档翻译耗时可久至30-60分钟，且体验较差，难以投入批量、高频翻译应用
- 成本高：翻译专家（尤其小语种）成本高、人才稀缺；专业翻译软件售价贵，灵活度受限
- 译文质量不高：不同翻译人员由于专业背景和语言习惯差异，导致翻译结果风格和术语不统一，有时甚至出现错译、漏译

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 基座模型灵活选择：该系统支持切换多种基座大模型
- 多语言翻译支持：该系统推荐采用的候选基座大模型均具备多语言互译能力，方便设置与使用

subsections.title: 2.7 核心指标
content: **核心业务指标**:
- 支持100+种语言互译，适配更多业务场景
- 文本翻译准确率 >= 98.5%、批量处理效率提升20-180倍
- 单次请求响应时间 <= 3秒
**核心技术指标**:
- 文本翻译准确率 >= 98.5%：同核心业务指标
- 单次请求响应时间 <= 3秒：同核心业务指标

subsections.title: 3.1 私部署-服务器部署版
content: **入选最佳实践理由**:
- 指标提升：该方案相比人工翻译流程，在处理效率上达到20-180倍提升（"小时"级提升至"秒"级）。其中，纯文本文档翻译速度 >= 2页/秒，图文混合文档 >= 1.5页/秒，20页文档约10秒内完成自动翻译。在翻译效率上位于当前机器翻译方案第一梯队。
- 该方案采用的基座模型Gemini 3 Pro，翻译准确率 >= 98.5%（并在MMLU多语言评测中被宣称为"expert"），与GPT-5.1、Claude 4.5 Opus相当（98~100%），优于Gemini 1.5、Claude 3.5 Opus（95.5%~97%）。同时，对科技、金融、法律等垂直领域术语库匹配准确率 >= 99%。
- 该方案采用的基座模型Gemini 3 Pro，支持100+种语言互译（GPT-4o支持约50+用户输入语言），覆盖约96%的企业高频使用语种，满足跨区域团队协作与全球化业务需求。
- 在系统性能指标上达到单次请求响应时间 <= 3秒、系统连续稳定运行 >= 99.9%，单批次上限可处理约50份文档，达到企业级高并发需求。
- 成本优化：该方案通过自动化流程、高精准翻译、格式遵循、批量化处理等特性，使人工操作的总成本（如翻译、校对、排版等）降低约80%。该方案在初步验证（构建Demo）阶段可合理利用Gemini免费配额及MCP和Gemini CLI等开源组件，降低约90%启动验证的算力成本，明显优于其他付费大模型策略。

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Rapidly build an intelligent document translation demo in one week

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Text translation tasks are widely used in daily office work, cross-border business communication, research paper writing and reading, product localization, and multi-regional distribution of operational content. They have extremely high usage frequency and rigid demand in industries such as information technology, finance and trade, research and education, and culture and media. Beyond text segment translation, real business processes also require efficient translation solutions for various editable formats such as Word, PDF, and Markdown.

**Solution**: This case proposes a privately deployable intelligent translation workflow, based on the Gemini 3 Pro large model with state-of-the-art comprehensive translation capabilities, combined with Gemini CLI and configurable prompt configuration files, to achieve an integrated translation process from text input, intelligent translation, quality assessment to result output.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry Category**: Information Technology, Administrative Management, Finance & Trade, Research & Education, Culture & Media
**Application Category**: Service, Operations, Management
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, MCP Tools, Multilingual Learning, Machine Translation, API Integration

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Stage: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low Efficiency: When manually processing various document formats, users often need to repeatedly copy and paste content into translation tools. Translating a 20-page document can take 30-60 minutes with poor user experience, making it difficult to apply in batch and high-frequency translation scenarios
- High Cost: Translation experts (especially for minority languages) are expensive and scarce; professional translation software is costly with limited flexibility

- Inconsistent Translation Quality: Different translators, due to varying professional backgrounds and language habits, produce translations with inconsistent styles and terminology, sometimes resulting in mistranslations and omissions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Features
content: - Flexible Base Model Selection: The system supports switching between multiple base large models
- Multilingual Translation Support: The recommended candidate base large models all have multilingual translation capabilities, making them easy to configure and use

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:
- Supports 100+ languages for mutual translation, adapting to more business scenarios
- Text translation accuracy >= 98.5%, batch processing efficiency improved by 20-180 times
- Single request response time <= 3 seconds
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Text translation accuracy >= 98.5%: Same as core business metrics
- Single request response time <= 3 seconds: Same as core business metrics

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: **Reasons for Selection as Best Practice**:

- Performance Improvement: Compared to manual translation processes, this solution achieves 20-180 times improvement in processing efficiency (from "hour" level to "second" level). Specifically, plain text document translation speed >= 2 pages/second, mixed text and image documents >= 1.5 pages/second, and a 20-page document can be automatically translated within about 10 seconds. This places it in the first tier of current machine translation solutions in terms of translation efficiency.

- The Gemini 3 Pro base model used in this solution has a translation accuracy >= 98.5% (and is claimed as "expert" in MMLU multilingual evaluation), comparable to GPT-5.1 and Claude 4.5 Opus (98-100%), and superior to Gemini 1.5 and Claude 3.5 Opus (95.5%-97%). Additionally, the terminology matching accuracy for vertical domains such as technology, finance, and law is >= 99%.

- The Gemini 3 Pro base model used in this solution supports 100+ languages for mutual translation (GPT-4o supports about 50+ user input languages), covering approximately 96% of high-frequency enterprise languages, meeting the needs of cross-regional team collaboration and global business operations.

- System performance metrics achieve single request response time <= 3 seconds, continuous stable operation >= 99.9%, and single batch capacity of approximately 50 documents, meeting enterprise-level high concurrency requirements.

- Cost Optimization: Through automated workflows, high-precision translation, format adherence, and batch processing, this solution reduces total manual operation costs (such as translation, proofreading, and typesetting) by approximately 80%. During the preliminary validation (building Demo) stage, the solution can reasonably utilize Gemini's free quota and open-source components such as MCP and Gemini CLI, reducing computing costs for validation by approximately 90%, significantly better than other paid large model strategies.

overview.highlight: 面向金融法审场景，通过智能要素抽取与跨合同规则校验，将原本高度依赖人工经验的合同审核流程升级为'可配置、可复用、可追溯'的智能审查体系，在保障金融级审计严谨性的同时，实现数量级的效率提升

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 面向金融法审场景，通过智能要素抽取与跨合同规则校验，将原本高度依赖人工经验的合同审核流程升级为'可配置、可复用、可追溯'的智能审查体系，在保障金融级审计严谨性的同时，实现数量级的效率提升

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 金融机构的授信、投融资等业务中，一个项目通常涉及贷款合同、保证合同、抵押合同、公司章程等多类型法律文件。法审人员需要对多个合同之间的关键信息进行一致性、合规性与完整性核查，工作强度大、专业要求高，且在高负载下人工审核难以保证稳定准确率。
**解决方案**: 本擂台聚焦'项目级多合同法审'这一典型高价值场景，任务定义为：输入为同一项目下的多份合同及相关佐证材料，输出为结构化的审核结果与风险点定位说明。核心关注点：审核效率、准确性、规则可复用性以及人机协作下的可控性。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 金融贸易
**应用类别**: 风控
**技术类别**: 智能体（Agent），大语言模型（LLM），数据治理

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：1天

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：咨询顾问1名、Agent工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 人工审核效率低：单个项目通常包含 5-6 份合同，传统方式需约 3 人天完成完整审核，且需多人流转协作
- 人工核对错误风险高：在高强度连续审核场景下，跨合同要素漏检、错检风险显著上升
- 规则难以沉淀与复用：审核经验高度依赖个人，难以形成标准化、模块化的审核规则体系
- 跨文档关联复杂：合同与合同、合同与佐证材料之间存在大量隐性关联，人工比对成本极高

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 合同要素自动提取：自动抽取贷款人、金额、编号等关键要素，并支持人工校正确认
- 跨合同审核规则校验：基于规则库，对同一项目内多合同进行一致性与合规性检查
- 可配置审核规则管理：支持用户自定义审核点、风险等级及合同类型映射
- 审核结果可视化展示：风险点原文定位、高亮标注与人工批注
- 相似合同智能检索：辅助法审人员进行横向对比与决策参考

subsections.title: 2.7 核心指标
content: **核心业务指标**
- 项目级合同审核整体效率提升
- 人工核对参与时间显著下降
- 审核规则复用率持续提升
- 审核结果可追溯、可复核
**核心技术指标**
- 合同要素抽取准确率（金融法审关键字段）
- 跨文档一致性判断准确率
- 规则逐条覆盖率（避免漏审）
- 人机协作流程下的可控性与稳定性
**其他价值回报**
- 推动金融法审经验的结构化与系统化沉淀
- 为后续风控、合规自动化场景提供可复制范式

subsections.title: 3.1 私部署-服务器部署版
content: **入选最佳实践理由**
- 指标提升：合同要素核对：从原本约 0.5 人天 / 项目，缩短至约 10 分钟完成，效率提升约 95%+
- 合同审核整体流程：从约 3 人天缩短至约 30 分钟完成，效率提升约 80%-90%
- 成本优化：审核人力投入显著下降，审核规则可长期复用，边际成本持续降低
- 其他优势：人机协作机制有效规避大模型幻觉
- 支持复杂金融法审逻辑，具备金融级审计严谨性
- 通过'代码节点 + 条件分支节点'实现对每个合同、每个审核点的逐条扫描与循环遍历，从技术底层确保'一规则一审'，杜绝漏审与误审。提升审核准确率。

overview.highlight: For financial legal review scenarios, through intelligent element extraction and cross-contract rule verification, the contract review process, which originally relied heavily on manual experience, is upgraded to a 'configurable, reusable, and traceable' intelligent review system, achieving order-of-magnitude efficiency improvements while ensuring financial-grade audit rigor

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - For financial legal review scenarios, through intelligent element extraction and cross-contract rule verification, the contract review process, which originally relied heavily on manual experience, is upgraded to a 'configurable, reusable, and traceable' intelligent review system, achieving order-of-magnitude efficiency improvements while ensuring financial-grade audit rigor

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: In financial institution credit, investment, and financing businesses, a project typically involves multiple types of legal documents such as loan contracts, guarantee contracts, mortgage contracts, and articles of incorporation. Legal review personnel need to verify consistency, compliance, and completeness of key information across multiple contracts, which involves high work intensity and professional requirements, and manual review under high load is difficult to ensure stable accuracy.

**Solution**: This arena focuses on the typical high-value scenario of 'project-level multi-contract legal review'. The task is defined as: input being multiple contracts and related supporting materials under the same project, output being structured review results and risk point location explanations. Core focus areas: review efficiency, accuracy, rule reusability, and controllability under human-machine collaboration.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry Category**: Financial Trade
**Application Category**: Risk Control
**Technology Category**: Agent, Large Language Model (LLM), Data Governance

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: 1 day

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Consultant, 1 Agent Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low manual review efficiency: A single project typically contains 5-6 contracts, and traditional methods require about 3 person-days to complete a full review, with multi-person collaborative workflow
- High risk of manual verification errors: In high-intensity continuous review scenarios, the risk of missing or incorrectly detecting cross-contract elements increases significantly
- Difficult to consolidate and reuse rules: Review experience is highly dependent on individuals, making it difficult to form a standardized, modular review rule system
- Complex cross-document associations: There are numerous implicit associations between contracts and between contracts and supporting materials, making manual comparison extremely costly

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Automatic contract element extraction: Automatically extract key elements such as borrower, amount, and number, with support for manual verification and confirmation
- Cross-contract review rule verification: Based on rule library, perform consistency and compliance checks on multiple contracts within the same project
- Configurable review rule management: Support user-defined review points, risk levels, and contract type mappings
- Review result visualization: Risk point original text location, highlighting, and manual annotation
- Intelligent similar contract retrieval: Assist legal review personnel in horizontal comparison and decision reference

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Indicators
content: **Core Business Indicators**
- Overall efficiency improvement in project-level contract review
- Significant reduction in manual verification participation time
- Continuous improvement in review rule reuse rate
- Review results are traceable and verifiable
**Core Technical Indicators**
- Contract element extraction accuracy (key fields for financial legal review)
- Cross-document consistency judgment accuracy
- Rule-by-rule coverage rate (avoid missed reviews)
- Controllability and stability under human-machine collaboration workflow
**Other Value Returns**
- Promote structured and systematic consolidation of financial legal review experience
- Provide replicable paradigm for subsequent risk control and compliance automation scenarios

subsections.title: 3.1 Private Deployment - Server Deployment Version
content: **Reasons for Selection as Best Practice**
- Indicator improvement: Contract element verification: reduced from about 0.5 person-days/project to about 10 minutes, efficiency improvement of about 95%+
- Overall contract review process: reduced from about 3 person-days to about 30 minutes, efficiency improvement of about 80%-90%
- Cost optimization: significant reduction in review manpower investment, review rules can be reused long-term, marginal costs continue to decrease
- Other advantages: Human-machine collaboration mechanism effectively avoids large model hallucinations
- Supports complex financial legal review logic, possesses financial-grade audit rigor

- Through 'code nodes + conditional branch nodes', achieves line-by-line scanning and loop traversal for each contract and each review point, technically ensuring 'one rule one review' from the bottom layer, eliminating missed and incorrect reviews. Improves review accuracy.

subsections.title: Phase Overview
content: - The project enters the formal development and implementation phase. The focus is no longer on "whether it is feasible", but on continuous optimization around stability, scalability, and business adaptability.
- Implementation content as follows:
- Continuous expansion of contract types and review rules
- As the business progresses, continuously supplement new contract types and expand new review points within the existing rule system, ensuring smooth expansion without disrupting existing logic.
- Strengthen cross-contract and cross-material correlation analysis
- Support uploading auxiliary supporting documents and automatically correlate them with the main contract content for cross-validation, further improving review completeness in complex scenarios.
- Optimize review result presentation and traceability

- Provide side-by-side display of original text and risk points, highlight annotations, risk level differentiation, and annotated result downloads in the frontend interface, improving the user experience and result credibility for reviewers.
- Continuously optimize human-machine collaboration paths
- Based on actual usage feedback, refine the interaction methods for manual confirmation and intervention nodes, ensuring no additional burden while effectively controlling review risks.

steps.title: Define Review Input and Context Structure

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: In the Demo phase, the contract review workflow input is simplified and standardized into three core categories of information. By clearly defining input boundaries, the workflow focuses on review judgment itself without assuming pre-processing responsibilities.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with workflow input structure design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Contract text, confirmed contract elements, review rule configuration

Description: Contract text refers to single or multiple contract documents; confirmed contract elements include entity names, amounts, contract numbers, etc. (assumed to be completed by upstream element extraction or manual confirmation); review rule configuration includes review points, review types, risk levels, and applicable contract types

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Standardized workflow input structure
Description: Clear input boundary definition ensures the workflow focuses on review judgment

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Configure Review Point and Contract Type Mapping

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Before workflow initiation, complete basic rule-side configuration, including defining multiple review points and contract types, and establishing the mapping relationship between review points and contract types.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Consultant, Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with contract review rule system design
Number: 2

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Review point definitions and contract type definitions

Description: Each review point includes review objective description, review type (e.g., consistency comparison, semantic compliance), and risk level; contract types include loan contracts, guarantee contracts, etc.

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Review point and contract type mapping configuration
Description: Determines whether a review point applies to the current contract and whether cross-contract information is needed, which is key to rule reuse

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Build Review Point Traversal and Loop Execution Logic

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: In the workflow, use code nodes combined with loop structures to traverse all review points applicable to the current contract, ensuring each review point is explicitly executed once.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with workflow loop logic design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Review point list and contract data
Description: All review points applicable to the current contract and related contract information

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Review point traversal execution logic
Description: Review results output by review point dimension, structurally eliminating missed reviews

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

steps.title: Set Conditional Branch Judgment by Review Type

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: For different types of review points, set conditional branch nodes in the workflow, including consistency comparison type, semantic compliance type, and material completeness type review points.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with conditional branch logic design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Different types of review points

Description: Consistency comparison type review points compare current contract elements with other contract elements in the project; semantic compliance type review points make compliance judgments based on contract clause semantics; material completeness type review points determine whether the contract is missing necessary clauses or attachments

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Conditional branch judgment logic
Description: Different review types enter different judgment branches, avoiding complex logic mixed in a single model call, improving judgment accuracy and interpretability

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: After each review point is executed, uniformly output structured results. All review point results are aggregated as the final output of the contract review workflow.

subsections.title: Participants
content: Role: Agent Engineer
Skills: Familiar with structured output design
Number: 1

subsections.title: Input
content: Input: Execution results from each review point
Description: Review point name, review conclusion, risk description, associated contract text location

subsections.title: Output
content: Output: Structured review results
Description: Final review results for frontend display and manual review

subsections.title: Estimated Time
content: 0.5 days

overview.industry: 信息技术，农林牧渔，能源制造

subsections.title: 亮点
content: - 一周构建1个高精度、含数据流闭环、具备自进化能力的通用目标检测系统Demo

subsections.title: 2.1 概况
content: **业务背景**: 目标检测作为计算机视觉的核心技术，广泛应用于交通导航、安防监控、医疗影像、农林畜牧等领域。其中，'背景复杂、目标微小、干扰物相似度高'是目标检测任务面临的典型难题。
**解决方案**: 所提方案构建了一套含图像采集、精准识别、数据回流等模块的通用目标检测流程，利用YOLOv11算法结合主动学习（Active Learning）机制，自动捕捉低置信度样本并触发模型迭代，解决现有检测模型上线后因环境变化而导致的性能衰减问题。

subsections.title: 2.2 分类标签
content: **行业类别**: 信息技术，农林牧渔，能源制造
**应用类别**: 运营，管理，风控
**技术类别**: 计算机视觉（CV），运维（测试&监控），数据治理，MLOps

subsections.title: 2.3 实施周期
content: - Demo研发：≤5日

subsections.title: 2.4 团队构成
content: - Demo阶段：业务专家1名、算法专家1名、MLOps工程师1名

subsections.title: 2.5 业务痛点
content: - 全量处理成本高昂：在目标对象（如缺陷、杂草、特定商品）仅占区域10%-30%的情况下，现有方案多采用全区域覆盖式处理，导致70%以上资源出现浪费
- 极度相似目标误检：当目标对象与背景或非目标对象（如'拟态'干扰物）特征极度相似时，人工或现有方案易产生误判，导致严重业务损失（如误伤作物、漏检次品）
- 沉没数据价值归零：传统作业过程缺乏数据留存，海量现场作业数据（特别是边缘与异常样例）未能转化为数据资产，严重影响模型学习与判断能力

subsections.title: 2.6 核心功能
content: - 精准目标过滤：能够从大面积复杂背景中毫秒级定位指定目标，替代全覆盖模式，降低成本
- 精细化层级分类：建有多层级分类体系，提升对形态极度近似的干扰项的识别准确率，降低使用风险
- 自动数据采集：在作业过程中自动捕获高价值长尾数据备份，无需人工干预，积累数据资产

subsections.title: 2.7 核心指标
content: **核心业务指标**:
- 节省50%-80%资源投入：仅面向被精准定位缩小后的目标范围投入资源（如针对虫害区域的农药投入量），大幅降低耗材与运营成本
- 长尾样本数据资产转化率98%：自动筛选并留存'低置信度'与'结果冲突'等长尾高难样本用于系统后续训练升级，减少无效数据堆积占用存储空间、降低运维成本
- 关键目标误伤/误报率≤5%：高混淆场景下，确保对非目标对象（如正常农作物）进行保护，预估挽救10~15%总财产损失
**核心技术指标**:
- 平均检测精度 (mAP@0.5) > 92%

content: - 版本类型：私部署-服务器部署版

subsections.title: 3.1.2 入选最佳实践理由
content: **指标提升**:
- 该方案的平均检测精度 (mAP@0.5) > 92%，解决了微小目标与复杂背景下的检测瓶颈，能聚焦更小操作范围从而降低投入成本
- 该方案的关键目标误伤/误报率指标 ≤ 5%，在高混淆场景下显著优于传统全覆盖模式（约为25%），该指标的提升确保了对非目标对象（如正常作物、良品）的保护，从而挽救约10~15%的总财产损失
- 在推理延迟指标上将99百分位响应延迟（P99）控制在30ms以内，相比上一代业界通用目标检测模型（YOLOv8）速度提升约15%，确保在高速作业场景下的实时响应
**成本优化**:
- 该方案采用的精准定位策略，相比现行常见的全区域覆盖策略，可节省约50~80%的资源（如农药、试剂等）投入
- 该方案通过自动筛选机制，将长尾有效样本的数据资产转化率提升至98%，减少存储空间中约80%的无效数据堆积，降低约50%的人工清洗、筛选、运维的成本
- 该方案基于YOLOv11轻量化架构，低参数量模型显著降低算力采购成本（显存不超过16GB）

overview.highlight: Build a high-precision universal object detection system demo with data flow loop and self-evolution capability in one week
overview.industry: Information Technology, Agriculture & Forestry, Energy & Manufacturing

subsections.title: Highlights
content: - Build a high-precision universal object detection system demo with data flow loop and self-evolution capability in one week

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Object detection, as a core technology of computer vision, is widely used in traffic navigation, security monitoring, medical imaging, agriculture, forestry and animal husbandry. Among them, 'complex background, tiny targets, and high similarity of interfering objects' are typical challenges faced by object detection tasks.

**Solution**: The proposed solution builds a universal object detection pipeline including image acquisition, precise recognition, and data feedback modules. Using YOLOv11 algorithm combined with Active Learning mechanism, it automatically captures low-confidence samples and triggers model iteration, solving the performance degradation problem caused by environmental changes after existing detection models go online.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Agriculture, Forestry & Animal Husbandry, Energy & Manufacturing
**Category**: Operations, Management, Risk Control
**Technology**: Computer Vision (CV), Operations (Testing & Monitoring), Data Governance, MLOps

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo Development: ≤5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo Phase: 1 Business Expert, 1 Algorithm Expert, 1 MLOps Engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - High cost of full-area processing: When target objects (such as defects, weeds, specific products) only occupy 10%-30% of the area, existing solutions mostly adopt full-area coverage processing, resulting in more than 70% resource waste

- False detection of extremely similar targets: When target objects have extremely similar features to background or non-target objects (such as 'mimicry' interference), manual or existing solutions are prone to misjudgment, leading to serious business losses (such as damaging crops, missing defective products)

- Zero value of sunk data: Traditional operation processes lack data retention, massive on-site operation data (especially edge and abnormal samples) fails to be converted into data assets, seriously affecting model learning and judgment capabilities

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Precise target filtering: Capable of millisecond-level positioning of specified targets from large-area complex backgrounds, replacing full-coverage mode and reducing costs
- Refined hierarchical classification: Equipped with multi-level classification system, improving recognition accuracy of extremely similar interfering items and reducing usage risks
- Automatic data collection: Automatically captures high-value long-tail data backups during operation without manual intervention, accumulating data assets

subsections.title: 2.7 Core Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**:

- Save 50%-80% resource investment: Only invest resources in the precisely positioned target range (such as pesticide investment for pest areas), significantly reducing consumables and operating costs

- Long-tail sample data asset conversion rate 98%: Automatically screen and retain 'low-confidence' and 'conflicting results' long-tail difficult samples for subsequent system training upgrades, reducing invalid data accumulation occupying storage space and lowering operation and maintenance costs
- Key target false damage/false positive rate ≤5%: In high-confusion scenarios, ensure protection of non-target objects (such as normal crops), estimated to save 10~15% of total property loss
**Core Technical Metrics**:
- Average detection precision (mAP@0.5) > 92%

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: **Performance Improvement**:

- The solution's average detection precision (mAP@0.5) > 92%, solving detection bottlenecks for tiny targets and complex backgrounds, enabling focus on smaller operation ranges to reduce investment costs

- The solution's key target false damage/false positive rate ≤ 5%, significantly better than traditional full-coverage mode (about 25%) in high-confusion scenarios. This improvement ensures protection of non-target objects (such as normal crops, quality products), thereby saving about 10~15% of total property loss

- In inference latency metrics, the 99th percentile response latency (P99) is controlled within 30ms, about 15% faster than the previous generation industry-standard object detection model (YOLOv8), ensuring real-time response in high-speed operation scenarios
**Cost Optimization**:
- The precise positioning strategy adopted by this solution can save about 50~80% of resources (such as pesticides, reagents) compared to the current common full-area coverage strategy

- Through automatic screening mechanism, this solution increases the long-tail valid sample data asset conversion rate to 98%, reducing about 80% of invalid data accumulation in storage space and lowering about 50% of manual cleaning, screening, and operation and maintenance costs
- Based on YOLOv11 lightweight architecture, low parameter model significantly reduces computing procurement costs (video memory not exceeding 16GB)
